The chancellor will detail the government's next phase in its plan to accelerate growth by partnering with the financial services sector and reforming pensions to unlock billions of pounds in investment.

title: Big Short legend Steve Eisman says everyone is buying the wrong AI stocks
description: Eisman famously called the housing bubble. Now he sees investors miscalculating the AI trade.
content:
Steve Eisman has a simple way to explain why SpaceX is the most absurd stock in America: its revenues are roughly equal to those of the company that makes Froot Loops. The difference? Nobody is valuing Kellogg’s at 100x revenue.



If you’ll recall, Eisman identified that a housing bubble was building in 2006 and 2007, fueled by an explosion in the issuance of “teaser-rate,” sub-prime mortgages, and that a crash was imminent. He famously seized the moment by shorting the home-loan market big time, a move that greatly profited both the trader and his firm FrontPoint Partners, a subsidiary of Morgan Stanley. Michael Lewis made Eisman a Wall Street legend by chronicling his exploits in his 2010 bestseller The Big Short. In the 2015 film version, Steve Carrell played the famously cranky, contrarian (re-named “Mark Baum”), while Marisa Tomei portrayed his wife and co-skeptic, former J.P. Morgan analyst Valerie Feigen (“Cynthia Baum”). Today, Eisman hosts the weekly podcast “The Real Eisman Playbook,” a program I highly recommend as much for its rollicking mockery of the group think that dominates the sell-side stock community as its sharp insights on economic trends and knack at nailing the basics that over time, drive outstanding returns to investors.



In a half-hour phone call, Eisman skewered the latest case where he reckons that hype and hysteria are fogging minds—and it’s hardly surprising that his new target’s none other than the SpaceX phenomenon. “SpaceX has the revenues of Kellogg’s, which makes Froot Loops, which I love, but no one is going out of their way to buy Froot Loops,” he declares. (The Ferrero Group of Italy bought Kellogg’s cereal business; Ferrero’s 2025 revenues of $21 billion are indeed close to SpaceX’s $19 billion.) “SpaceX stock’s being valued at over 100 times revenue, whereas no company of any size has ever had that kind of valuation. By comparison, Palantir is at 50x.” Eisman relates that Elon Musk plans to make money from ventures that only exit in the fictional world. “I grew up reading a lot of sci-fi, a ton of it, I’ve read it all,” says Eisman. “Musk and Silicon Valley grew up on it, too. The difference is, Musk and the SpaceX crew take it seriously!”



Eisman notes that a particular source of riches SpaceX hopes to pluck from the planets especially caught his attention, since it’s central to the plot of a sci-fi streamer he loves. “In the SpaceX S-1, where they talk about things SpaceX will eventually do, one of them is asteroid mining. Literally, there is really a great, wonderful sci-fi show on Apple TV called ‘For All Mankind,’ and asteroid mining plays an important part on the show. (Indeed page 71 of the SpaceX S-1 contains the following: “We plan to pursue asteroid mining operations to extract metals and other critical resources from near-Earth and main-belt asteroids, providing abundant raw materials for space-based industries.”)



It also puzzles Eisman that Musk is building an enterprise that straddles at least two industries, and may well add another, when the corporate world’s moving in the opposite direction. “Why make the company into a massive conglomerate, when conglomerates are totally out of favor? The world is de-conglomerate-izing. People want pure play, and they’re in rockets, Starlink and AI.” The prospect that SpaceX will buy Tesla, Musk’s second largest holding, is especially appalling to Eisman. “Tesla’s been a horrible failure for the past several years,” he avows. “Every year Musk says we’ll have self-driving cars and robotaxis, which he doesn’t do, and all we know is that earnings go down year after year. Musk is a cult, so people keep saying ‘wait till next year.'” 



Eisman holds a dim view of the hyper-scalers’ future in AI



Eisman points to a part of the S-1 that’s effectively a manifesto wagering SpaceX’s future on AI. In fact, its chief AI product sports a brand name that Eisman fondly recalls from his teenage sci-fi enchantment. “Robert Heinlein invented the word ‘grok’ in his novel ‘Stranger in a Strange Land’ [1961] about a Martian who comes earth,” says Eisman. “In the book, ‘grok’ means ‘deep understanding.'” In contrast to its lofty moniker, Grok the product’s a lightweight, claims Eisman. “The S-1 says that SpaceX total addressable market is $28.5 trillion, and the irony is that over 90% of that TAM is AI, which is all about Grok,” he intones. “Grok is a third-tier product. I’ve heard reports that even the engineers in Musk’s own space division won’t use it because it sucks.”



Overall, he says, the outlook for the hyperscalers is darkening fast. “We’ve seen a sea change in their AI story, and not for the better,” he declares. “That’s because of two vectors. The first is that for the hyperscalers, AI is becoming increasingly capital intensive. Last year, Alphabet spent $80 billion on AI and funded it from cash flow. This year, it will spend $180 to $190 billion and raised $85 billion in stock. Now, they all have to raise funding through stock offerings because the table stakes get bigger and bigger.” He adds that post-IPO, SpaceX will need to keep tapping the capital markets since its recurring cash flow doesn’t come close to meeting its hunger for AI-driven capex.



“The other vector is that there are no ‘moats’ in AI,” he contends. “Someone moves to ChatGPT then to Gemini then to Claude. Even if AI is the greatest thing since the invention of the printing press, there are no moats to shield the providers. You don’t want to be the hyperscalers selling this highly competitive product where you have to cut prices to win customers. You want to be the suppliers selling them the picks and shovels, the chips and networking gear the hyper-scalers buy to make their products. Those products are highly customized and protected.” For Eisman, it’s far better to be a Nvidia, Arista or Cisco riding the capex boom than a Meta, Oracle, Microsoft or Alphabet battling a field of fellow behemoths in the brutal arena where the enterprise and retail solutions are easily swappable.



Eisman stresses that he’s not advising anyone to short SpaceX. “I have no opinion on what will happen to SpaceX,” he says. “From a fundamental perspective, it’s ridiculous But a lot of things can be ridiculous for a long time.” For this dourest of doubters, Musk’s claims for the feats ahead can only happen in the SpaceX founder’s head, or in the sci-fi fantasies Eisman grew up on.
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: PM Modi: ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ମୋଦୀଙ୍କ ସେଚେଲ୍ସ ଗସ୍ତରେ ବିଶ୍ୱର ସବୁଠାରୁ ବୟସ୍କ କଇଞ୍ଚ ‘ଜୋନାଥନ୍’କୁ ଭେଟିବେ
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ: ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ନରେନ୍ଦ୍ର ମୋଦୀତିନିଦିନିଆ ସେଚେଲ୍ସ ଗସ୍ତରେ ଥିବା ବେଳେ ସେଠାରେ ସେ ବିଶ୍ୱର ସବୁଠାରୁ ବୟସ୍କ ସ୍ଥଳଭାଗ ଜୀବ ‘ଜୋନାଥନ୍’ ନାମକ ଏକ ବିଶାଳକାୟ କଇଞ୍ଚକୁ ଭେଟିବାର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମ ରହିଛି। ଭାରତ ଓ ସେଚେଲ୍ସମଧ୍ୟରେ କୂଟନୈତିକ ସମ୍ପର୍କ ସ୍ଥାପନର ୫୦ ବର୍ଷ ପୂର୍ତ୍ତି ବା ସୁବର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଜୟନ୍ତୀ ଅବସରରେ ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀଙ୍କୁ ସେଚେଲ୍ସର ଜାତୀୟ ଦିବସ ସମାରୋହରେ ‘ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଅତିଥି’ ଭାବେ ନିମନ୍ତ୍ରଣ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଏହି ଗସ୍ତ ସମୟରେ ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ସେଠାକାର ଜାତୀୟ ବଟାନିକାଲ୍ ଗାର୍ଡେନ୍ ପରିଦର୍ଶନ କରିବା ସହ ପରିବେଶ ସଂରକ୍ଷଣର ବାର୍ତ୍ତା ଦେଇ ଏକ ବୃକ୍ଷରୋପଣ ମଧ୍ୟ କରିବେ।
ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀଙ୍କୁ ସେଚେଲ୍ସର ଜାତୀୟ ଦିବସ ସମାରୋହରେ ‘ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଅତିଥି’ ଭାବେ ନିମନ୍ତ୍ରଣ
ଗିନିଜ୍ ୱାର୍ଲଡ୍ ରେକର୍ଡସ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ପୃଥିବୀର ସବୁଠାରୁ ଦୀର୍ଘଜୀବୀ ସ୍ଥଳଚର ପ୍ରାଣୀର ମାନ୍ୟତା ପାଇଥିବା ଏହି ସେଚେଲ୍ସ ଜାତୀୟ କଇଞ୍ଚ ‘ଜୋନାଥନ୍’ର ଜନ୍ମ ଆନୁମାନିକ ୧୮୩୨ ମସିହାରେ ହୋଇଥିଲା ଏବଂ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ତା’ର ବୟସ ପ୍ରାୟ ୧୯୪ ବର୍ଷ। ବିଗତ ଦୁଇ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀ ଧରି ବିଶ୍ୱର ଅନେକ ଐତିହାସିକ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନର ମୂକସାକ୍ଷୀ ସାଜିଥିବା ଏହି ଜୀବଟି ବାର୍ଦ୍ଧକ୍ୟ ଜନିତ କାରଣରୁ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିଶକ୍ତି ଓ ଶୁଙ୍ଘିବା ଶକ୍ତି ହ୍ରାସ ପାଇଥିଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ଯତ୍ନ ଯୋଗୁଁ ଏବେ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ସୁସ୍ଥ ଓ ସେଚେଲ୍ସର ସବୁଠାରୁ ବଡ଼ ଆକର୍ଷଣପାଲଟିଛି। ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ମୋଦୀଙ୍କ ଏହି ଉଚ୍ଚସ୍ତରୀୟ ଗସ୍ତ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଦ୍ୱିପାକ୍ଷିକ ଆଲୋଚନା ସହ ଦୁଇ ଦେଶ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ସାମୁଦ୍ରିକ ସୁରକ୍ଷା, ବ୍ଲୁ ଇକୋନୋମି ଏବଂ ଜଳବାୟୁ ପ୍ରତିରୋଧକ ଶକ୍ତି ବୃଦ୍ଧି କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ରଣନୈତିକ ସହଯୋଗ ଆହୁରି ମଜବୁତ ହେବ।

title: ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପୋଲିସକୁ ମିଳିବ ‘ପ୍ରେସିଡେଣ୍ଟସ୍୩ କଲର:  ଜୁଲାଇ ୫ରେ ଗୃହମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଅମିତ ଶାହ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବେ ସମ୍ମାନ
description:
ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱର, ୨୭।୬: ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପୋଲିସ ପାଇଁ ଏକ ଗୌରବମୟ ମୁହୂର୍ତ୍ତ ଆସିବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି। ଦେଶର ଅନ୍ୟତମ ସର୍ବୋଚ୍ଚ ପୋଲିସ ସମ୍ମାନ ‘ପ୍ରେସିଡେଣ୍ଟସ୍ କଲର’ (President’s Colour) ରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପୋଲିସକୁ ସମ୍ମାନିତ କରାଯିବ। ଆସନ୍ତା ଜୁଲାଇ ୫ ତାରିଖରେ ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରସ୍ଥିତ ୭ମ ବାଟାଲିଅନ୍ ପଡ଼ିଆରେ ଆୟୋଜିତ ଏକ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ସମାରୋହରେ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଗୃହମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଅମିତ ଶାହ ଏହି ସମ୍ମାନ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବେ। ଦୀର୍ଘ ବର୍ଷ ଧରି ଆଇନ-ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳା ରକ୍ଷା, ଅପରାଧ ନିୟନ୍ତ୍ରଣ, ବାମପନ୍ଥୀ ଉଗ୍ରବାଦ ମୁକାବିଲା, ବିପର୍ଯ୍ୟୟ […]
The post ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପୋଲିସକୁ ମିଳିବ ‘ପ୍ରେସିଡେଣ୍ଟସ୍୩ କଲର:  ଜୁଲାଇ ୫ରେ ଗୃହମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଅମିତ ଶାହ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବେ ସମ୍ମାନ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱର, ୨୭।୬: ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପୋଲିସ ପାଇଁ ଏକ ଗୌରବମୟ ମୁହୂର୍ତ୍ତ ଆସିବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି। ଦେଶର ଅନ୍ୟତମ ସର୍ବୋଚ୍ଚ ପୋଲିସ ସମ୍ମାନ ‘ପ୍ରେସିଡେଣ୍ଟସ୍ କଲର’ (President’s Colour) ରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପୋଲିସକୁ ସମ୍ମାନିତ କରାଯିବ। ଆସନ୍ତା ଜୁଲାଇ ୫ ତାରିଖରେ ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରସ୍ଥିତ ୭ମ ବାଟାଲିଅନ୍ ପଡ଼ିଆରେ ଆୟୋଜିତ ଏକ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ସମାରୋହରେ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଗୃହମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଅମିତ ଶାହ ଏହି ସମ୍ମାନ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବେ।
ଦୀର୍ଘ ବର୍ଷ ଧରି ଆଇନ-ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳା ରକ୍ଷା, ଅପରାଧ ନିୟନ୍ତ୍ରଣ, ବାମପନ୍ଥୀ ଉଗ୍ରବାଦ ମୁକାବିଲା, ବିପର୍ଯ୍ୟୟ ସମୟରେ ଜନସେବା ଏବଂ ସାଧାରଣ ଲୋକଙ୍କ ସୁରକ୍ଷା କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପୋଲିସର ଉଲ୍ଲେଖନୀୟ ଅବଦାନକୁ ସ୍ୱୀକୃତି ଦେଇ ଏହି ସମ୍ମାନ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରାଯାଉଛି।
‘ପ୍ରେସିଡେଣ୍ଟସ୍ କଲର’ ହେଉଛି କୌଣସି ପୋଲିସ ବା ସଶସ୍ତ୍ର ବାହିନୀ ପାଇଁ ସର୍ବୋଚ୍ଚ ସମ୍ମାନ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଅନ୍ୟତମ। ଦୀର୍ଘକାଳୀନ ନିଷ୍ଠାପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ସେବା, ବୃତ୍ତିଗତ ଦକ୍ଷତା, ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳା ଏବଂ ଜାତୀୟ ସେବାରେ ବିଶେଷ ଅବଦାନ ପାଇଁ ଏହି ସମ୍ମାନ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରାଯାଏ।
ସମାରୋହରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ସରକାରଙ୍କ ବରିଷ୍ଠ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ, ପୋଲିସ ମହାନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକ (DGP), ବରିଷ୍ଠ ପୋଲିସ ଅଧିକାରୀ ଏବଂ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ବାହିନୀର ପ୍ରତିନିଧିମାନେ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ରହିବେ। ଏହି ଅବସରରେ ଏକ ଭବ୍ୟ ପରେଡ୍‌ର ମଧ୍ୟ ଆୟୋଜନ କରାଯିବ।
ଏହି ସମ୍ମାନ ମିଳିବା ପରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପୋଲିସର ମନୋବଳ ଆହୁରି ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇବା ସହ ଜନସେବା ଓ ଆଇନ-ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳା ରକ୍ଷା କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ଅଧିକ ନିଷ୍ଠାର ସହ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ କରିବାକୁ ପ୍ରେରଣା ମିଳିବ ବୋଲି ଆଶା କରାଯାଉଛି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପୋଲିସକୁ ମିଳିବ ‘ପ୍ରେସିଡେଣ୍ଟସ୍୩ କଲର:  ଜୁଲାଇ ୫ରେ ଗୃହମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଅମିତ ଶାହ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବେ ସମ୍ମାନ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Radhika pleads to the media for privacy as K Bhagyaraj's funeral
description: Amidst the somber occasion of K. Bhagyaraj's mortal remains being brought home, actress Radhika Sarathkumar made an impassioned plea to the media for privacy. Witnessing the emotional scenes, she urged photographers and camera crews to respect the grieving family's need for space during this difficult time, emphasizing entertainment through films and requesting a moment of peace. Her compassionate appeal has resonated widely.

title: Lorde opens up about PMDD diagnosis and releases 49 ‘Virgin’ demos to celebrate album’s first anniversary
description:
"I had the sense that I was setting myself free, building a holy site," she said of making the album
The post Lorde opens up about PMDD diagnosis and releases 49 ‘Virgin’ demos to celebrate album’s first anniversary appeared first on NME.
content:
Lorde has marked the first anniversary of ‘Virgin‘ by sharing a collection of demos from the album, as well as a newsletter detailing the making of it.

READ MORE: Lorde – ‘Virgin’ review: the inquisitive artist strips herself bare

The letter, shared yesterday (June 26), includes 49 demos dating back to 2022, as well as notes and photographs from the album’s creation. They’re available to listen to on the streaming platform untitled.stream.
“Last year we played around with making an album worth of these skeleton versions, cool composites of a few different versions. But on Sunday night, I realised true X-rays of Virgin would be realer, funnier, more revealing of crookedness and slant,” she wrote of her decision to share the demos.
Lorde also opened up about the emotional weight of the record, admitting that sharing it felt “raw and exposing in a new way.” Reflecting on its intense creative process, she shared that “every single day making Virgin was a total gift,” even as she navigated personal challenges, including a breakup, an eating disorder, and a PMDD [Premenstrual Dysphoric Disorder] diagnosis.
“I had the sense that I was setting myself free, building a holy site,” she wrote. “I concentrated on singing to myself the way I needed to be sung to.”

Lorde went on to say that she had been working on recovering from what she described as a “brief but long gestating” eating disorder while recording the album, including deleting a calorie-tracking app and working on her relationship with food.
“The week we started what would become Shapeshifter and What Was That I was working on believing that breakfast wasn’t a negotiation. I made myself drink a smoothie every morning, went to work when I wanted to run away, kept trying, one foot in front of the other.”
She also shared that a friend had noticed she seemed to fall into intense depression around her period each month, leading to her being diagnosed with PMDD – a severe form of premenstrual syndrome that can cause significant mood disturbances in the lead-up to menstruation.
Lorde also opened up about the influence of Charli XCX‘s ‘Brat‘, which she described as “a weather system of fearlessness and fragility”.
“My nascent stage was suddenly, shockingly external. I had to really look at my shit and stay open,” she wrote. “Charli kept me close and gave me the perfect amount of space, that takes real care. My faith in music as a social technology was restored. At the parties and festivals I smoked and sang and felt like part of the human race.”
In a postscript, she mentioned having googled burnout symptoms and said she was now on an SSRI and feeling better.

  










View this post on Instagram

























 
‘Virgin’ was given a four-star review by NME, which read: “‘Virgin’ is a vibrant combination of Lorde’s best qualities, and then some.”
“With her newfound candour, the record combines the emotional whirlwind of ‘Melodrama’, the chilling minimalism of ‘Pure Heroine’ and the breezy freedom of ‘Solar Power’,” it added. “This might be called ‘Virgin’, but Lorde proves she’s not afraid to strip herself bare.”
While Lorde rarely broke out the Charli XCX collab in her ‘Ultrasound Tour’ shows, last October she did play the song live while at the Kia Forum in Los Angeles and brought out the ‘360’ singer as a surprise guest.
Since the ‘Virgin’ record arrived and the ‘Ultrasound’ live dates kicked off, Lorde has donated over $200,000 from merch sales to Minnesota immigrant funds, and also been confirmed as a headliner for All Points East 2026 in London. That line-up also includes PinkPantheress, Zara Larsson and more as support.
For help and advice on mental health:

CALM – The Campaign Against Living Miserably
Help Musicians UK – Around the clock mental health support and advice for musicians (CALL MUSIC MINDS MATTER ON: 0808 802 8008)
Music Support Org – Help and support for musicians struggling with alcoholism, addiction, or mental health issues (CALL: 0800 030 6789)
YOUNG MINDS – The voice for young people’s health and wellbeing
Time To Change – Let’s end mental health discrimination
The Samaritans – Confidential support 24 hours a day

The post Lorde opens up about PMDD diagnosis and releases 49 ‘Virgin’ demos to celebrate album’s first anniversary appeared first on NME.

title: "Moral clarity on Gaza": Rahul Gandhi backs Sonia Gandhi's call for Independent Foreign Policy; claims India 'slipping into Israel's strategic orbit'
description:
New Delhi , June 27 : Congress leader Rahul Gandhi on Saturday intensified his criticism of the central government's foreign policy, arguing that India is drifting into Israel's strategic orbit while the rest of the world increasingly pivots away. Gandhi's sharp remarks come in support of a recent editorial by Congress Parliamentary Party Chairperson Sonia Gandhi, in which she urges the nation to reclaim its independent voice and advocate for peace and 'humanitarian values' in Gaza.
Rahul Gandhi, in a post shared on X, reiterated a humanitarian appeal, echoing the editorial written by the CPP Chairperson Sonia Gandhi.
Highlighting his alignment with the CPP Chairperson's position, he wrote, "Through her editorial, Congress Parliamentary Party Chairperson Smt. Sonia Gandhi ji calls on India to reclaim its independent foreign policy, uphold humanitarian values, and speak up with moral clarity on Gaza."
Leader of Opposition further detailed his concerns regarding India's current diplomatic path, alleging that India is becoming dangerously aligned with Israel's 'strategic orbit' at a time when much of the world is distancing itself.
He wrote, "We are slipping further into Israel's strategic orbit, at a time when the world is increasingly pivoting away from it. The Prime Minister's visit to Israel will go down in history as a bewildering strategic decision."
Emphasising the humanitarian imperative as the core of his message, he wrote, "The spirit of Indian nationhood demands that we speak up for our Palestinian brothers and sisters whose children have been so brutally targeted."
Meanwhile, Congress President Mallikarjun Kharge, in a post on X, referenced Sonia Gandhi's writing to illustrate how the current foreign policy has caused India to lose its traditional standing among key partners in Iran and the Middle East, stating, "We have also distanced ourselves from global public opinion."
He wrote, "Sonia Gandhi's evocative piece calling out Modi Govt's silence and inaction for our Palestinian brothers and sisters, whose children have been brutally targeted, is a stark reminder of how our current foreign policy has alienated our historical allies in Palestine, Iran, and the larger Middle East. We have also distanced ourselves from global public opinion."
Meanwhile, Congress Parliamentary Party Chairperson Sonia Gandhi, in her article, also questioned the Modi government's stance on the ongoing humanitarian crisis in Gaza and the West Bank.
Sonia Gandhi argued that the current administration's lack of a public position is inconsistent with India's national interests and moral traditions.
Earlier in the day, Sonia Gandhi's remarks, which highlight the suffering of Palestinian families, were also posted by Priyanka Gandhi Vadra to emphasise the urgent need for a shift in the government's current foreign policy approach.
"The calculus of national interest demands that we respond to the global public opinion against the Israeli regime's genocidal actions in Gaza and its brutal displacement and dispossession of lakhs of Palestinian families in the occupied West Bank. The Modi government's continued silence simply cannot be explained rationally or morally. -Smt. Sonia Gandhi ji, CPP Chairperson," the post read.
Meanwhile, on June 20, Israeli strikes in Gaza killed at least six people, including two children and a cameraman with broadcaster Al Jazeera, according to Palestinian health officials, as reported by Politico.
Earlier in June, the Palestinian Ministry of Health claimed the Palestinian health sector is facing a serious and unprecedented humanitarian crisis as a result of the suffocating financial crisis and the continued financial siege imposed by Israel, a situation they claim now threatens the lives of thousands of Palestinian patients and places the healthcare system on the brink of collapse.
According to the Palestinian side, the situation further deteriorated amid sharp economic decline, rising poverty and unemployment rates, and the increasing dependence of Palestinian citizens on already overstretched public healthcare services.
The Palestinian side further warned that the continued deterioration of the healthcare sector constitutes a grave humanitarian threat and calls upon the international community, humanitarian organisations, and donor states to take urgent action to support the Palestinian health sector and safeguard the right of Palestinian patients to life and medical treatment. (ANI)

title: திமுக கூட்டணியிலிருந்து மதிமுக விலகல்!
After food brands, FSSAI issues notice to Bisk Farm parent SAJ Food Products; here’s why
description: FSSAI notice to SAJ Food Products: According to FSSAI, the complaint alleged that the product's front label claimed "100% Atta", while the ingredients list stated that atta constituted 72.33 per cent of the product, raising concerns over whether the packaging could mislead consumers.
content: FSSAI notice to SAJ Food Products: Continuing its crackdown on brands over misleading claims, the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) has now issued notice to SAJ Food Products, which owns Bisk Farm brand, following a consumer complaint.Why SAJ Food Products came under FSSAI radar?The food regulator has issued a notice to SAJ Food Products over the labelling and marketing claims of its "Eat Fit Digestive Biscuits".According to FSSAI, the complaint alleged that the product's front label claimed "100% Atta", while the ingredients list stated that atta constituted 72.33 per cent of the product, raising concerns over whether the packaging could mislead consumers.“FSSAI has issued a notice to SAJ Food Products following a consumer complaint regarding misleading claims on "Eat Fit Digestive Biscuits". The manufacturer has been directed to furnish an explanation within 7 days,” the food regulator said in an X post.‘No added sugar’ claimFSSAI said the "no added sugar" claim could be misleading because the biscuits contain maltodextrin and glucose syrup solids.The authority also questioned the use of the "100 per cent atta" claim, stating that the product contains other ingredients and additives and may not comply with existing advisories governing such declarations on food labels.SAJ Food Products asked to clarify within a weekThe regulator has directed SAJ Food Products to submit its explanation within seven days and clarify why action should not be initiated under the provisions of the Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006.FSSAI’s crackdown continuesThis comes a few days after FSSAI issued notices to eight food business operators for using misleading brand names, trade names and product claims in violation of the Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006.The companies served notices include Emami Healthy & Tasty, Health Aid, Troovy, The Healthy Factory, Healthy Master, Healthy Choice, Plan B and Neuherbs, news agency PTI reported.Prior to that, FSSAI served notices to KFC, Flipkart India, Open Secret and Nestlé after taking cognisance of social media complaints related to hygiene and product quality concerns.FSSAI urged states to boost food safetyEarlier this month, PTI reported that FSSAI had asked states to fill existing vacancies at the earliest for strengthening enforcement activities and ensuring safe food to consumers.FSSAI CEO Rajit Punhani has directed states and UTs to "expedite the recruitment of Food Safety Officers (FSOs) and Designated Officers (DOs) and fill existing vacancies to strengthen field-level regulatory capacity and scale up food safety enforcement across the country".The deliberations were held at the 50th meeting of the Central Advisory Committee (CAC) of FSSAI, which was held in Shimla, according to a statement.Punhani emphasised the need for stronger food safety enforcement across the country.He stressed that robust enforcement remains central to ensuring safe food for consumers.The CEO "directed states and UTs to scale up enforcement activities and significantly increase food sampling and surveillance".(With PTI inputs)

title: MAHA TET Exam Cancelled: मोठी बातमी! ‘नीट’ नंतर आता ‘टीईटी’चा पेपर फुटला; उद्या होणारी परीक्षा रद्द
description: मुंबई | Mumbaiदेशभरात गाजलेल्या ‘नीट’ (NEET) पेपरफुटीचे प्रकरण अजून शांत झालेले नसतानाच आता महाराष्ट्रात पुन्हा एकदा पेपरफुटीचा धक्कादायक प्रकार समोर आला आहे. महाराष्ट्र शिक्षक पात्रता परीक्षाचा पेपर फुटल्याची धक्कादायक माहिती समोर आली आहे. ठाण्यात टीईटी परीक्षेचा पेपर फुटल्याचे उघडकीस आले आहे, त्यामुळेच खबरदारीचा उपाय म्हणून उद्या (२८ जून) होणारी ही परीक्षा तडकाफडकी रद्द करण्यात आली […]
content:
मुंबई | Mumbaiदेशभरात गाजलेल्या ‘नीट’ (NEET) पेपरफुटीचे प्रकरण अजून शांत झालेले नसतानाच आता महाराष्ट्रात पुन्हा एकदा पेपरफुटीचा धक्कादायक प्रकार समोर आला आहे. महाराष्ट्र शिक्षक पात्रता परीक्षाचा पेपर फुटल्याची धक्कादायक माहिती समोर आली आहे. ठाण्यात टीईटी परीक्षेचा पेपर फुटल्याचे उघडकीस आले आहे, त्यामुळेच खबरदारीचा उपाय म्हणून उद्या (२८ जून) होणारी ही परीक्षा तडकाफडकी रद्द करण्यात आली आहे. यामुळे लाखो विद्यार्थ्यांना पुन्हा एकदा ही परीक्षा कधी होणार, याची वाट पाहावी लागणार असल्याने परीक्षार्थींमधून तीव्र संताप व्यक्त केला जात आहे.



ठाण्यात टीईटीचा पेपर फुटल्याची माहिती समोर आली आहे. राज्यात २ लाख २६ हजार शिक्षक उद्या टीईटीचा पेपर देणार होते, महाराष्ट्र राज्य परीक्षा परिषदेतर्फे टीईटीचा पेपर घेण्यात येणार होता, मात्र त्या आधीच आता पेपर फुटल्याने परीक्षा रद्द करण्यात आली आहे.



ठाण्यातून काही जणांना ताब्यात घेतले, प्रश्नपत्रिकाही जप्तकाही टोळ्या पैसे घेऊन विद्यार्थ्यांपर्यंत हा पेपर पोहोचवत असल्याचा सुगावा पोलिसांना लागला होता. माहिती मिळताच पोलिसांनी तातडीने सापळा रचून ज्या संशयितांकडे हा पेपर होता, त्यांच्यापर्यंत पोहोचून प्रश्नपत्रिका जप्त केल्या. हा गंभीर प्रकार समोर आल्यानंतर पोलिसांनी तात्काळ शिक्षण विभागाला या संपूर्ण प्रकरणाची सविस्तर माहिती दिली.



महाराष्ट्रातील पेपरफुटीचे ग्रहण काही केल्या संपताना दिसत नाहीये. परीक्षा होण्याच्या २४ तास आधीच पेपर बाहेर आल्याने खळबळ उडाली आहे. या परीक्षेचे पेपर पैसे देऊन वाटले जात असल्याची खबर पोलिसांना मिळाली आणि पोलिसांनी सापळा रचून पेपर वाटणाऱ्यांना ताब्यात घेतले आहे. या संदर्भात त्यांची सखोल चौकशी सुरू आहे. त्यांना हे पेपर कुठून मिळाले? सूत्राधारापर्यंत पोहोचण्यासाठी पोलिसांकडून सध्या पेपर वाटणाऱ्या संशयितांची चौकशी सुरू आहे. शिक्षण विभागाला या सगळ्याची माहिती देण्यात आली आहे. शिक्षण विभागही आपली भूमिका थोड्याच वेळात जाहीर करण्याची शक्यता आहे.



राज्यभरातून लाखो उमेदवारांनी या परीक्षेसाठी जय्यत तयारी केली होती. परीक्षा केंद्रांवर गैरप्रकार रोखण्यासाठी प्रशासनाने कडक नियमावलीही जाहीर केली होती. मात्र, ऐन परीक्षेच्या पूर्वसंध्येलाच ठाण्यातून पेपर लीक झाल्याची माहिती समोर आल्याने राज्यभरातील विद्यार्थ्यांमध्ये आणि कार्यरत शिक्षकांमध्ये तीव्र संताप व्यक्त केला जात आहे.



Nashik Crime News: फुटबॉल बेटिंगवर स्ट्राइक; सायबर पेट्रोलिंगने उघड केलं दीड कोटीचं बेटिंग रॅकेट



आधीच या टीईटी (TET) परीक्षे संदर्भात गेल्या काही दिवसांपासून विविध कारणांमुळे मोठी चर्चा रंगली होती. काही दिवसांपूर्वी झालेल्या गोंधळामुळे ही परीक्षा आधीच वादाच्या आणि चर्चेच्या केंद्रस्थानी होती. अशातच आता थेट पेपर लीक झाल्याने शिक्षण विभागाने ही परीक्षा तात्काळ स्थगित करण्याचा निर्णय घेतला आहे. शिक्षण विभागाकडून काही वेळातच या संदर्भातील अधिकृत ‘प्रेस नोट’ आणि सूचना जारी केली जाणार आहे. तसेच या संपूर्ण प्रकरणाची सखोल चौकशी करण्याचे आदेशही शिक्षण मंत्रालयाने दिले आहेत.







“कोणत्याही परिस्थितीत परीक्षा पूर्णपणे पारदर्शक आणि कॉपीमुक्त वातावरणातच पार पडली पाहिजे, हा परीक्षा परिषदेचा ठाम आग्रह आहे. या संपूर्ण प्रकरणाची सखोल चौकशी होणे गरजेचे असल्याने उद्या होणारी परीक्षा पुढे ढकलण्यात येत आहे,” असे राज्य परीक्षा परिषदेने आपल्या अधिकृत निवेदनात म्हटले आहे. शिक्षक पात्रता (TET) परिक्षेबाबत अद्यावत माहिती महाराष्ट्र राज्य परीक्षा परिषदेच्या वेबसाईटवर प्रसिद्ध करण्यात येईल, असेही प्रशासनातर्फे स्पष्ट करण्यात आले आहे.

title: Congress: ଚାଷୀ ଆତ୍ମହତ୍ୟା ଘଟଣା: ରାଜ୍ୟ କଂଗ୍ରେସ ପ୍ରତିନିଧି ଦଳର ମୃତକଙ୍କ ପରିବାର ସହ ଆଲୋଚନା
description:
ନୂଆପଡ଼ା: କୋମନା ଥାନା ଜଡ଼ାମୁଣ୍ଡା ଗାଁର ଚାଷୀ ନେପାଲ ମାଝୀ ଆତ୍ମହତ୍ୟା ଘଟଣାରେ ସେଠାରେ ଶନିବାର ରାଜ୍ୟ କଂଗ୍ରେସର ଏକ ପ୍ରତିନିଧି ଦଳ ପହଞ୍ଚିଛନ୍ତି। ମୃତ ନେପାଲ ମାଝୀଙ୍କ ପରିବାର ସହ ଆଲୋଚନା କରିଛନ୍ତି। 
କଂଗ୍ରେସ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାଳୟରେ ରିପୋର୍ଟ ଦାଖଲ
ରାଜ୍ୟ ପିସିସି ସଭାପତି ଭକ୍ତ ଚରଣ ଦାସଙ୍କ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ କ୍ରମରେ ଜି. ଉଦୟଗିରି ବିଧାୟକ ପ୍ରଫୁଲ୍ଲ ପ୍ରଧାନ, ଚିତ୍ରକୋଣ୍ଡା ବିଧାୟକ ମଙ୍ଗୁ ଖିଲେ, କଳାହାଣ୍ଡି ପୂର୍ବତନ ବିଧାୟକ ଭାରତ ଭୂଷଣ ବେମାଲ, ବରଗଡ଼ ପୂର୍ବତନ ବିଧାୟକ ସାଧୁ ଚରଣ ନେପାକ, ରାଜ୍ୟ କିଷାନ ସେଲ ସଭାପତି ଅଭୟ ସାହୁ, ନୂଆପଡ଼ା ଜିଲ୍ଲା ସଭାପତି ଘାସିରାମ ମାଝୀ, ଉପସଭାପତି ଭରତଲାଲ ରାଉତ, କଂଗ୍ରେସର ବରିଷ୍ଠ ନେତା ଫକୀର ଜଗତ, ଅଙ୍କିତ ସିଙ୍ଗାହୀ, ରବି ମଙ୍ଗରାଜ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ରହିରେ ଶନିବାର ଜଡ଼ାମୁଣ୍ଡା ଆତ୍ମହତ୍ୟା କରିଥିବା ଚାଷୀଙ୍କ ଘରକୁ ଯାଇ ପରିବାର ଲୋକଙ୍କ ସହ ଆଲୋଚନା କରି ଏକ ରିପୋର୍ଟ ପ୍ରଦେଶ କଂଗ୍ରେସ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାଳୟରେ ଦାଖଲ କରିବାକୁ ପିସିସି ସଭାପତି ଶ୍ରୀ ଦାସ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ ଦେଇଥିବା ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି।
Tamilnadu Case: ଜାତୀୟ ମାନବାଧିକାର କମିସନରେ ତାମିଲନାଡ଼ୁରେ ୧୧ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଶ୍ରମିକଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ମାମଲା

title: ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଚାଲାଣ କରୁଥିଲେ, ପୋଲିସକୁ ଦେଖି ଡିଭାଇଡରରେ ପିଟିହେଲା କାର୍; ଜବତ ହେଲା ୨୫ ଲକ୍ଷର…
description:
ଝାରସୁଗୁଡ଼ା, ୨୭।୬(ଆଶିଷ ରଞ୍ଜନ ଦାଶ): ଝାରସୁଗୁଡ଼ା ଜିଲା ବଡ଼ମାଲ ଥାନା ପୋଲିସକୁ ମିଳିଛି ଏକ ବଡ଼ ସଫଳତା। ବିଜୁ ଏକ୍ସପ୍ରେସ୍‌ ୱେର ଖେରୁଆଲ୍ ଛକ ନିକଟରୁ ବିପୁଳ ପରିମାଣର ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଜବତ କରିବା ସହ ପୋଲିସ ଜଣେ ଆନ୍ତଃରାଜ୍ୟ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ମାଫିଆକୁ ଗିରଫ କରିଛି। ଜବତ ହୋଇଥିବା ପ୍ରାୟ ୨୫୦ କିଲୋଗ୍ରାମ (ଅଢେଇ କ୍ୱିଣ୍ଟାଲ୍) ଗଞ୍ଜେଇର ଆନୁମାନିକ ବଜାର ମୂଲ୍ୟ ପ୍ରାୟ ୨୫ ଲକ୍ଷ ଟଙ୍କା ହେବ ବୋଲି ସୂଚନା ମିଳିଛି। ସୂଚନା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ବୌଦ୍ଧ ଜିଲାରୁ […]
The post ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଚାଲାଣ କରୁଥିଲେ, ପୋଲିସକୁ ଦେଖି ଡିଭାଇଡରରେ ପିଟିହେଲା କାର୍; ଜବତ ହେଲା ୨୫ ଲକ୍ଷର… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଝାରସୁଗୁଡ଼ା, ୨୭।୬(ଆଶିଷ ରଞ୍ଜନ ଦାଶ): ଝାରସୁଗୁଡ଼ା ଜିଲା ବଡ଼ମାଲ ଥାନା ପୋଲିସକୁ ମିଳିଛି ଏକ ବଡ଼ ସଫଳତା। ବିଜୁ ଏକ୍ସପ୍ରେସ୍‌ ୱେର ଖେରୁଆଲ୍ ଛକ ନିକଟରୁ ବିପୁଳ ପରିମାଣର ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଜବତ କରିବା ସହ ପୋଲିସ ଜଣେ ଆନ୍ତଃରାଜ୍ୟ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ମାଫିଆକୁ ଗିରଫ କରିଛି। ଜବତ ହୋଇଥିବା ପ୍ରାୟ ୨୫୦ କିଲୋଗ୍ରାମ (ଅଢେଇ କ୍ୱିଣ୍ଟାଲ୍) ଗଞ୍ଜେଇର ଆନୁମାନିକ ବଜାର ମୂଲ୍ୟ ପ୍ରାୟ ୨୫ ଲକ୍ଷ ଟଙ୍କା ହେବ ବୋଲି ସୂଚନା ମିଳିଛି।
ସୂଚନା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ବୌଦ୍ଧ ଜିଲାରୁ ଏକ କାର୍ ଯୋଗେ ପ୍ରଚୁର ପରିମାଣର ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଛତିଶଗଡ଼ର ରାୟଗଡ଼ ଅଭିମୁଖେ ଚାଲାଣ କରାଯାଉଥିଲା। ଶନିବାର ଭୋର ପ୍ରାୟ ୪ଟା ସମୟରେ ବିଜୁ ଏକ୍ସପ୍ରେସ୍‌ ୱେର ଖେରୁଆଲ ଛକ ନିକଟରେ ପେଟ୍ରୋଲିଂ କରୁଥିବା ବଡ଼ମାଲ ପୋଲିସ ଏହି କାର୍‌କୁ ସନ୍ଦେହ କରି ପିଛା କରିଥିଲା। ପୋଲିସ ଗାଡ଼ିକୁ ଦେଖି ଖସି ପଳାଇବାକୁ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରୁଥିବା ବେଳେ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଭର୍ତ୍ତି କାର୍‌ଟି ନିୟନ୍ତ୍ରଣ ହରାଇ ରାସ୍ତା ଡିଭାଇଡରରେ ପିଟି ହୋଇ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାଗ୍ରସ୍ତ ହୋଇଥିଲା।
ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ପରେ କାର୍‌ରେ ଥିବା ଦୁଇ ଜଣ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ଦୌଡ଼ି ପଳାଇବାକୁ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରୁଥିବା ବେଳେ ପାଟ୍ରୋଲିଂ ପୋଲିସ ସେମାନଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଜଣକୁ କାବୁ କରିବାରେ ସଫଳ ହୋଇଥିଲା ଏବଂ ଅନ୍ୟ ଜଣେ ଅନ୍ଧାରର ସୁଯୋଗ ନେଇ ଫେରାର୍ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି। ଗିରଫ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ଜଣକ ମଧ୍ୟପ୍ରଦେଶର ବାସିନ୍ଦା ଅଙ୍କିତ ଶର୍ମା ବୋଲି ପୋଲିସ ଚିହ୍ନଟ କରିଛି। ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାଗ୍ରସ୍ତ କାର୍ ଯାଞ୍ଚ ବେଳେ ସେଥିରୁ ଅଢେଇ କ୍ୱିଣ୍ଟାଲ୍  ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ମିଳିଥିଲା। ଏହି ବେଆଇନ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ କାରବାର ର଼୍ୟାକେଟ୍ ପଛରେ ଆଉ କେଉଁମାନେ ସଂପୃକ୍ତ ଅଛନ୍ତି, ସେ ନେଇ ବଡ଼ମାଲ ପୋଲିସ ଅଧିକ ତଦନ୍ତ ଜାରି ରଖିଛି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଚାଲାଣ କରୁଥିଲେ, ପୋଲିସକୁ ଦେଖି ଡିଭାଇଡରରେ ପିଟିହେଲା କାର୍; ଜବତ ହେଲା ୨୫ ଲକ୍ଷର… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Pakistan terror: ପାକିସ୍ତାନର ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ପ୍ରେମର ପୁଣି ଥରେ ପର୍ଦ୍ଦାଫାଶ
description:
ଇସଲାମାବାଦ: ପାକିସ୍ତାନର ପୂର୍ବତନ ଦ୍ରୁତ ବୋଲର ସୋଏବ ଅଖତର ସମ୍ପ୍ରତି କ୍ରିକେଟ୍ ପାଇଁ ନୁହେଁ, ବରଂ ଏକ ଅଧିକ ଗମ୍ଭୀର ତଥା ବିବାଦୀୟ କାରଣ ପାଇଁ ଖବରରେ ଅଛନ୍ତି। ନିକଟରେ ତାଙ୍କ ବଡ଼ ଭାଇ ଶାହିଦ ଅଖତରଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ତାଙ୍କ ଅନ୍ତିମ ସଂସ୍କାର ଇସଲାମାବାଦରେ ଅନୁଷ୍ଠିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଏହି ଦୁଃଖଦ ଘଟଣାର ଫଟୋ ଏବଂ ଭିଡିଓ ସୋସିଆଲ ମିଡିଆରେ ଏବେ ଦ୍ରୁତ ଗତିରେ ଭାଇରାଲ ହେବାରେ ଲାଗିଛି। ଏହି ଭାଇରାଲ ଭିଡିଓଗୁଡ଼ିକ ସୋଏବ ଅଖତରଙ୍କ ଭାଇଙ୍କ ଅନ୍ତିମ ସଂସ୍କାର ଖବରକୁ ଏକ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ଏବଂ ରାଜନୈତିକ ପ୍ରସଙ୍ଗରେ ପରିଣତ କରିଛି। ଭାଇରାଲ ଭିଡିଓରେ ନିଷିଦ୍ଧ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ସଂଗଠନ ଲସ୍କର-ଏ-ତୈବା ଏବଂ ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ସେଣ୍ଟ୍ରାଲ ମୁସଲିମ ଲିଗ୍ (ଏମସିଏମଏଲ)ର ଅନେକ ସଦସ୍ୟ ଦେଖାଯାଇଛନ୍ତି। ଏହା ପୁଣି ଥରେ ପ୍ରମାଣିତ କରିଛି ଯେ, ବିପଦପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀମାନେ ପାକିସ୍ତାନର ରାଜରାସ୍ତାରେ ନିର୍ଭୟରେ ବୁଲୁଛନ୍ତି। ପ୍ରକାଶିତ ଏହି ଖବର ସମଗ୍ର ବିଶ୍ୱକୁ ଚକିତ କରିଛି ଏବଂ ପାକିସ୍ତାନର ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ ଉପରେ ସନ୍ଦେହ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଛି। ଅନ୍ତିମ ସଂସ୍କାରରେ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ସଂଗଠନର ନେତାଙ୍କ ଉପସ୍ଥିତି ଦେଶର ସୁରକ୍ଷା ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥାର ପର୍ଦ୍ଦାଫାଶ କରିଛି।
ଅନ୍ତିମ ସଂସ୍କାର ପ୍ରାର୍ଥନାରେ ଯୋଗ ଦେଇଥିଲେ
ରିପୋର୍ଟ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଇସଲାମାବାଦର ଏଚ୍‌-୮ କବରସ୍ତାନରେ ଶାହିଦ ଅଖତରଙ୍କ ଅନ୍ତିମ ସଂସ୍କାର ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ରୀତିନୀତି ସହିତ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ସେଣ୍ଟ୍ରାଲ୍ ମୁସଲିମ୍ ଲିଗ୍ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଇନାମ-ଉର-ରେହମାନ ମଧ୍ୟ ଅନ୍ତିମ ସଂସ୍କାର ପ୍ରାର୍ଥନାରେ ଯୋଗ ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ଇନାମ-ଉର-ରେହମାନଙ୍କୁ ଲସ୍କର-ଏ-ତୈବା ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠାତା ତଥା ୨୬/୧୧ ଆକ୍ରମଣର ମାଷ୍ଟର ମାଇଣ୍ଡ ହାଫିଜ୍ ସଇଦଙ୍କର ଜଣେ ଘନିଷ୍ଠ ସହଯୋଗୀ ବୋଲି ବିବେଚନା କରାଯାଏ। ଏହି ଭିଡିଓଟି ପିଏମଏଲର ସରକାରୀ ସୋସିଆଲ ମିଡିଆ ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମରେ ସେୟାର କରାଯାଇଥିଲା।
ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ସେଣ୍ଟ୍ରାଲ୍ ମୁସଲିମ୍ ଲିଗ୍‌କୁ ଲସ୍କର-ଏ-ତୈବା ପାଇଁ ଏକ ନୂତନ ରାଜନୈତିକ ମୋର୍ଚ୍ଚା ଏବଂ ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମ ଭାବରେ ବିବେଚନା କରାଯାଉଛି। ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଇନାମ-ଉର-ରେହମାନଙ୍କ ନାମ ଅନେକ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକଳାପ ଏବଂ ବିବାଦରେ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ଭାବରେ ସ୍ଥାନ ପାଇଛି। ସୋସିଆଲ ମିଡିଆରେ ପୁରୁଣା ଫଟୋଗୁଡ଼ିକରେ ଇନାମ-ଉର-ରେହମାନଙ୍କୁ ପହଲଗାମ୍ ଆକ୍ରମଣର ମାଷ୍ଟରମାଇଣ୍ଡ ସୈଫୁଲ୍ଲା କସୁରୀଙ୍କ ସହିତ ଦେଖାଯାଉଛି। ଏହା ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ଭାବରେ ଦର୍ଶାଉଛି ଯେ, ଏହି ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ସଂଗଠନଗୁଡ଼ିକ ପାକିସ୍ତାନୀ ସମାଜରେ ଗଭୀର ଭାବେ ଜଡ଼ିତ ରହିଛନ୍ତି।
ଅନ୍ତିମ ସଂସ୍କାରରେ କେବଳ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀମାନେ ନୁହେଁ ବରଂ ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ବରିଷ୍ଠ ଏବଂ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱବାନ ଅଧିକାରୀମାନେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଯୋଗ ଦେଇଥିଲେ । ପାକିସ୍ତାନର ଜାତୀୟ ବିଧାନସଭାର ବାଚସ୍ପତି ସର୍ଦ୍ଦାର ଆୟାଜ ସାଦିକ ମଧ୍ୟ ଶୋକ ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ସୋଏବ ଅଖତରଙ୍କ ଘରକୁ ଯାଇଥିଲେ। ବିଧାନସଭାର ସରକାରୀ ବିବୃତିରେ କୁହାଯାଇଛି ଯେ, ବାଚସ୍ପତିସ୍ୱର୍ଗତଃଙ୍କ ଆତ୍ମା ​​ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରାର୍ଥନା କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଗୋଟିଏ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ଏବଂ ସରକାରୀ ଅଧିକାରୀଙ୍କ ଉପସ୍ଥିତି ପାକିସ୍ତାନର ଦୋମୁହାଁ ନୀତିକୁ ପ୍ରକାଶ କରି ଭଦ୍ରମୁଖା ଖୋଲି ଦେଇଛି।
ଅନ୍ତିମ ସଂସ୍କାରରେ ନିଷିଦ୍ଧ ସଂଗଠନର ସଦସ୍ୟଙ୍କ ଉପସ୍ଥିତି ପାକିସ୍ତାନର ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥା ଉପରେ ଗମ୍ଭୀର ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ଉଠାଇଛି। ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ସ୍ତରରେ ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ନିରନ୍ତର ଭାବରେ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀଙ୍କୁ ଆଶ୍ରୟ ଦେବାର ଗମ୍ଭୀର ଅଭିଯୋଗର ସମ୍ମୁଖୀନ ହୋଇଛି। ନିଷିଦ୍ଧ ସଂଗଠନଗୁଡ଼ିକ ସେମାନଙ୍କର ନାମ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ କରି ଏବଂ ନୂତନ ରାଜନୈତିକ ମଞ୍ଚ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରି ଦେଶରେ ସେମାନଙ୍କର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକଳାପ ଜାରି ରଖିଛନ୍ତି। ବିଶ୍ୱସ୍ତରରେ ଏବେ ଏହି ପ୍ରସଙ୍ଗରେପାକିସ୍ତାନଠାରୁକଡ଼ା ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ଆଶା କରାଯାଉଛି।

title: ଶିଶୁ ଜନ୍ମ ହେଲେ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଦେବେ ୧ ଗ୍ରାମର ସୁନା ମୁଦି, ରାଜ୍ୟ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ଖାସ୍ ସ୍କିମ୍…

The post ଶିଶୁ ଜନ୍ମ ହେଲେ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଦେବେ ୧ ଗ୍ରାମର ସୁନା ମୁଦି, ରାଜ୍ୟ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ଖାସ୍ ସ୍କିମ୍… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଚେନ୍ନାଇ,୨୭ା୬: ତାମିଲନାଡୁ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଥାଲାପତି ବିଜୟ ନିଜର ଏକ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ନିର୍ବାଚନୀ ପ୍ରତିଶ୍ରୁତି ପୂରଣ କରିବାକୁ ଯାଉଛନ୍ତି। ଏଣିକି ରାଜ୍ୟର ସମସ୍ତ ସରକାରୀ ମାତୃତ୍ୱ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଓ ମଙ୍ଗଳ ହସ୍ପିଟାଲରେ ଜନ୍ମଗ୍ରହଣ କରୁଥିବା ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଶିଶୁଙ୍କୁ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ୧ ଗ୍ରାମର ସୁନା ମୁଦି ଉପହାର ସ୍ୱରୂପ ଦିଆଯିବ। ଯଦିଓ ଏହି ଯୋଜନା ଆନୁଷ୍ଠାନିକ ଭାବେ ସେପ୍ଟେମ୍ବର ୧୫ ରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବ, କିନ୍ତୁ ଏହା ଜୁନ୍ ୨୨ (ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ବିଜୟଙ୍କ ଜନ୍ମଦିନ) ଠାରୁ ଲାଗୁ ହେବ ବୋଲି ଧରାଯିବ। ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନର ସୁନା ମୂଲ୍ୟ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ମୁଦିର ମୂଲ୍ୟ ପ୍ରାୟ ୧୩,୬୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା ହେବ।
ଏହି ଯୋଜନାର ସଫଳ ରୂପାୟନ, ତଦାରଖ ଏବଂ ପରିଚାଳନା ପାଇଁ ରାଜ୍ୟ ସରକାର ଏକ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ‘ଷ୍ଟେଟ୍ ପ୍ରୋଜେକ୍ଟ ମ୍ୟାନେଜମେଣ୍ଟ ୟୁନିଟ୍’ ଗଠନ କରିବେ। ଏହି ଯୋଜନାର ନାମ ‘ଥାଇମାମନ୍ ଥାଙ୍ଗା ମୋଥିରମ୍ ଥିଟ୍ଟମ୍’ (Thaimaman Thanga Mothiram Thittam) ରଖାଯାଇଛି। ପୂର୍ବତନ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ସି. ଏନ୍. ଆନ୍ନାଦୁରାଇଙ୍କ ଜୟନ୍ତୀ ଅବସରରେ ଆସନ୍ତା ସେପ୍ଟେମ୍ବର ୧୫ ତାରିଖରେ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ସି. ଜୋସେଫ୍ ବିଜୟ ଆନୁଷ୍ଠାନିକ ଭାବେ ଏହି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମର ଶୁଭାରମ୍ଭ କରିବେ।
ଏହି ଅଭିନବ ଯୋଜନାଟି ତାମିଲ ସଂସ୍କୃତିର ପାରମ୍ପରିକ ପ୍ରଥା ‘ଥାଇମାମନ୍ ସୀର’ (Thaimaman Seer) ଉପରେ ଆଧାରିତ। ଏହି ପ୍ରଥା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ପରିବାରକୁ ଆସିଥିବା ନବଜାତ ଶିଶୁକୁ ସ୍ୱାଗତ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ମାମୁଁ (ମାଆଙ୍କ ଭାଇ) ଉପହାର ଦେଇଥାନ୍ତି।
ସରକାରୀ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶନାମା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଏହି ଯୋଜନା ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ସରକାର ରାଜ୍ୟର ସରକାରୀ ଚିକିତ୍ସାଳୟରେ ଜନ୍ମ ନେଉଥିବା ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଶିଶୁ ପାଇଁ ‘ମାମୁଁ’ର ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରୁଛନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ଶିଶୁକୁ ସ୍ୱାଗତ କରିବାର ପ୍ରତୀକ ସ୍ୱରୂପ ଏକ ସୁନା ମୁଦି ପ୍ରଦାନ କରୁଛନ୍ତି।
ଜୁନ୍ ୨୩ ରେ ଜାରି କରାଯାଇଥିବା ସରକାରୀ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶନାମାରେ କୁହାଯାଇଛି, “ସରକାରୀ ଅନୁଷ୍ଠାନରେ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ନବଜାତ ଶିଶୁକୁ ଦିଆଯାଉଥିବା ୧ ଗ୍ରାମର ସୁନା ମୁଦି ହେଉଛି ଆଦର ଏବଂ ସ୍ମୃତିର ଏକ ପ୍ରତୀକ। ‘ଥାଇମାମନ୍ ଥାଙ୍ଗା ମୋଥିରମ୍ ଥିଟ୍ଟମ୍’ ଜରିଆରେ ଏହା ମାତୃତ୍ୱର ଆନନ୍ଦ ଏବଂ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱକୁ ଉତ୍ସବ ଭାବେ ପାଳନ କରେ।” ଏହି ଯୋଜନାକୁ ଚଳାଇବା ପାଇଁ ସରକାର ବାର୍ଷିକ ପ୍ରାୟ ୭୫୫.୮୩ କୋଟି ଟଙ୍କା ବ୍ୟୟବରାଦ କରିଛନ୍ତି।

The post ଶିଶୁ ଜନ୍ମ ହେଲେ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଦେବେ ୧ ଗ୍ରାମର ସୁନା ମୁଦି, ରାଜ୍ୟ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ଖାସ୍ ସ୍କିମ୍… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Taylor Swift’s top 5 stage moments
description: Taylor Swift's 'Eras' tour has captivated audiences with magical moments. Notable highlights include the unexpected appearance of Travis Kelce during 'I Can Do It With a Broken Heart' and Selena Gomez's special performance of 'Hands to Myself' from the 'Reputation' tour. The introduction of songs from 'The Tortured Poets Department' and the charming Karyn the Cobra further showcase Swift's dynamic stage presence, leaving fans enthralled.

description: Saif Ali Khan was stabbed six times by an intruder at his Mumbai home on January 16, 2025, while his son Jeh was also attacked. Recalling the horrifying night, Saif said forgiving his attacker is hard. The accused, Mohammad Shariful Islam, was arrested three days later from Thane.

title: "India Never Asked Anyone to Abandon Their Faith": LG Sinha
description:
Srinagar, Jun 27 : Asserting that India’s civilisational identity is rooted in inclusivity and respect for all faiths, Jammu and Kashmir Lieutenant Governor Manoj Sinha on Saturday said the country has never imposed any religion on others nor asked anyone to renounce their faith. Instead, he said, India has always welcomed people of different beliefs with the message: “Come with your faith and live with us.”
Addressing the Interfaith Dialogue at the Sher-i-Kashmir International Conference Centre (SKICC) here, the Lieutenant Governor, as per the news agency—Kashmir News Observer (KNO), said the gathering reflected India’s timeless traditions of wisdom, dialogue, tolerance and peaceful coexistence.
He said India, since ancient times, has nurtured an environment where diverse philosophies, cultures, religions and schools of thought have flourished together with mutual respect and dignity.
“This is the land where humanity was taught how to live together with compassion, dignity and mutual respect,” Sinha said, adding that India’s civilisation has always regarded diversity as its greatest strength rather than a source of conflict.
Explaining the concept of Dharma, the Lieutenant Governor said it transcends religion and sect, representing righteousness, duty and values that sustain society. Quoting the Rig Veda, he said the ancient scriptures recognised one Supreme Being who belongs to all humanity.
Referring to the Atharva Veda, he said the ancient text envisioned the Earth as a common home where people following different beliefs, traditions and ways of worship coexist peacefully.
“I call this Bharatiyata,” Sinha said, adding that even Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti described this spirit as the essence of Hindustan.
He said Indian civilisation has always upheld the belief that no human being is superior or inferior and that all people belong to one human family. Truth, he said, is eternal, while diversity is a divine blessing.
Describing Jammu and Kashmir as the crown of India’s civilisational heritage, the Lieutenant Governor said Kashmiriyat embodies the very ideals of Bharatiyata and is rooted in compassion, coexistence, tolerance and mutual respect.
He said these values have shaped Kashmir’s composite culture since ancient times and continue to define its social fabric.
Referring to the arrival of Islam in the Indian subcontinent, Sinha said India’s response was characterised by dialogue, cultural exchange and intellectual cooperation rather than confrontation. He noted that several Sanskrit works were translated into Arabic, enabling the exchange of knowledge across civilisations.
Quoting the Bhagavad Gita, he said God accepts every devotee irrespective of the form in which He is worshipped, reflecting India’s belief that different paths ultimately lead to the same truth.
Highlighting India’s long tradition of providing refuge, Sinha said people fleeing persecution were welcomed without being asked to abandon their religion.
“When people fleeing persecution came to India, no one told them to give up their religion. India welcomed them with the message: bring your faith with you and live together with us,” he said.
Calling it one of the defining characteristics of Indian civilisation, the Lieutenant Governor said no other country has demonstrated such a long and uninterrupted tradition of religious accommodation.
Sinha also referred to the evolution of Urdu, saying several historians believe the language was initially known as Hindi before acquiring its present identity in the nineteenth century. He highlighted the contribution of Amir Khusro in shaping India’s composite culture and literary heritage.
At a time when the world is witnessing conflicts, intolerance and uncertainty, India’s civilisational wisdom offers hope and guidance, he said.
The Lieutenant Governor also recalled the legacy of Nalanda University as one of the world’s greatest centres of learning and referred to Mughal emperor Akbar’s efforts to foster dialogue among different faiths.
He paid tribute to Guru Nanak Dev, Yogini Lalleshwari and several saints and spiritual leaders whose teachings strengthened Kashmir’s tradition of communal harmony and human brotherhood.
Sinha said Kashmir reflects India’s shared spiritual heritage, where temples, mosques, shrines, gurdwaras and churches stand together as symbols of mutual respect and coexistence.
Referring to the peaceful observance of Muharram, he said the administration remains fully committed to ensuring that all religious events are conducted with dignity and harmony.
He also announced that a high-level meeting on the forthcoming Shri Amarnath Yatra would be held later in the day to review preparations and ensure the smooth and safe conduct of the annual pilgrimage.
Quoting a Kashmiri saying that God is one though called by different names, Sinha stressed that humanity’s shared spiritual values must always prevail over divisions.
Invoking Mahatma Gandhi, he said words acquire meaning only when translated into action. “Whatever we say, we must demonstrate through our conduct. Otherwise, our words lose their value,” he remarked.
The Lieutenant Governor expressed hope that the message emerging from the Interfaith Dialogue would inspire people across Jammu and Kashmir to move forward with mutual trust, respect and a shared commitment to peace, harmony and inclusive development—(KNO)

title: Nashik Crime News: फुटबॉल बेटिंगवर स्ट्राइक; सायबर पेट्रोलिंगने उघड केलं दीड कोटीचं बेटिंग रॅकेट
description: नाशिक | प्रतिनिधीसध्या सुरू असलेल्या फिफा फुटबॉल वर्ल्ड कपच्या फिव्हरचा गैरफायदा घेत सुरू असलेल्या एका आंतरराज्यीय ऑनलाइन बेटिंग रॅकेटचा नाशिक शहर सायबर पोलिसांनी पर्दाफाश केला आहे. पोलिसांच्या तांत्रिक सायबर पेट्रोलिंगदरम्यान हा प्रकार उघडकीस आला असून, पोलिसांनी थेट वडनेरदुमाला ते कळवणपर्यंत माग काढत हे हायटेक बेटिंग सेंटर उद्ध्वस्त केले. प्राथमिक तपासात तब्बल दीड १ कोटी रुपयांचे […]
content:
नाशिक | प्रतिनिधीसध्या सुरू असलेल्या फिफा फुटबॉल वर्ल्ड कपच्या फिव्हरचा गैरफायदा घेत सुरू असलेल्या एका आंतरराज्यीय ऑनलाइन बेटिंग रॅकेटचा नाशिक शहर सायबर पोलिसांनी पर्दाफाश केला आहे. पोलिसांच्या तांत्रिक सायबर पेट्रोलिंगदरम्यान हा प्रकार उघडकीस आला असून, पोलिसांनी थेट वडनेरदुमाला ते कळवणपर्यंत माग काढत हे हायटेक बेटिंग सेंटर उद्ध्वस्त केले. प्राथमिक तपासात तब्बल दीड १ कोटी रुपयांचे संशयास्पद व्यवहार झाल्याची धक्कादायक माहिती समोर आली आहे. गुजरातच्या मुख्य बुकीसह पाच जणांना बेड्या ठोकण्यात आल्या आहेत.



सायबर पोलीस ठाण्याचे अमलदार भूषण देशमुख आणि दर्शन सोनवणे हे सोशल मीडिया आणि इंटरनेटवर सायबर पेट्रोलिंग करत असताना त्यांना वडनेरदुमाला परिसराशी संबंधित काही संशयास्पद ऑनलाईन लिंक्स आणि आयपी ड्रेस मिळून आले. या तांत्रिक धाग्यांचा अत्यंत गोपनीयतेने माग काढत सायबर पोलिसांनी थेट वडनेर आंतरराज्यीय दुमाला ते कळवणमधील गंगा निवास या ठिकाणी छापा टाकला. या छाप्यात बुकींचे नेटवर्क उघड झाले. संशयितांनी ग्राहकांकडून पैसे स्वीकारण्यासाठी क्यूआर कोडचा वापर केला होता.



Raj Thackeray: यांच्या वर्दीचा खाकी रंग पोलीस दलाचा आहे असा आमचा समज होता…; राज ठाकरेंचा आयपीएस विश्वास नांगरे पाटलांवर निशाणा



रेड्डी ४१० ब्रँच, क्रिकबेट ९९, ११एक्स, प्ले कसिनो या बेकायदेशीर वेबसाइट्सच्या माध्यमातून सट्टा चालवला जात होता. ग्राहकांनी क्यूआर कोड स्कॅन करून पैसे पाठवल्यानंतर, ते पैसे पकडले जाऊ नयेत म्हणून वेगवेगळ्या ५४ बँक खात्यांमध्ये फिरवले जायचे आणि त्यानंतर एटीएमद्वारे काढून घेतले जात. आतापर्यंत सुमारे दीड कोटींचे ट्रान्झेक्शन पोलिसांच्या रडारवर आले आहे. घटनास्थळावरून चार लॅपटॉप, १८ मोबाईल, ५४ पासबुक, चार राऊटर, २५ एटीएम कार्ड आणि २६ सिमकार्ड जप्त करण्यात आले आहेत. आरोपी केवळ कमिशनवर नोकरी करत होते की या मास्टरमाइंड मागे आणखी मोठे मासे आहेत, याचा तपास सायबर पोलिस करत आहेत.



गुजरातच्या बुकीसह ५ जण गजाआडपोलीस आयुक्त संदीप कर्णिक यांच्या मार्गदर्शनाखाली गुन्हेशाखेचे सहाय्यक आयुक्त संदीप मिटके, सायबरचे वरिष्ठ पोलीस निरीक्षक संजय पिसे यांच्या पथकाने ही कामगिरी केली. अटक केलेल्यांमध्ये गुजरातच्या साबरकंठा येथील मुख्य बुकी पठाण अरबाज खान फरीद खान (२३) याच्यासह अरबाज शब्बीर शेख (२७, रा. देवळाली), आसीफ जाफर हुसेन (४२, रा. लासलगाव), पंकज नामदेव आहेर (३४, रा. पाथर्डीरोड, नाशिक) आणि सागर रमेश कांबळे (३८, रा. कोल्हापूर) यांचा समावेश आहे.

title: ଏକାଠି ହେଲେ ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ଠିକାଦାର ସଂଘ: ଆଗକୁ…
description:
ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି,୨୭|୬(ଅଶେଷ ନାଥ ମିଶ୍ର) ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି ବ୍ଲକ ଜକର ଗ୍ରାମ ନିକଟ ମା ‘ ରତ୍ନେଶ୍ୱରୀ ଶକ୍ତିପୀଠ ପରିସରରେ  ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ନିଖିଳ ଓଡିଶା ଠିକାଦାର ମହାସଂଘ ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ଶାଖା ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଆଲୋଚନା ସଭା ଅନୁଷ୍ଠିତ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି। ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି ବ୍ଳକ ଠିକାଦାର  ସଂଘ ସଭାପତି ପ୍ରଶାନ୍ତ କୁମାର ପ୍ରଧାନଙ୍କ ସଂଯୋଜନାରେ ଆୟୋଜିତ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମରେ ଜିଲା ସଭାପତି ଉମାକାନ୍ତ ସାହୁ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷତା କରିଥିଲେ। ଜିଲା ଉପସଭାପତି ଗୋପାଳ ପଣ୍ଡା , ସମ୍ପାଦକ ଜି . ଗୋପାଳ ରାଓ […]
The post ଏକାଠି ହେଲେ ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ଠିକାଦାର ସଂଘ: ଆଗକୁ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି,୨୭|୬(ଅଶେଷ ନାଥ ମିଶ୍ର) ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି ବ୍ଲକ ଜକର ଗ୍ରାମ ନିକଟ ମା ‘ ରତ୍ନେଶ୍ୱରୀ ଶକ୍ତିପୀଠ ପରିସରରେ  ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ନିଖିଳ ଓଡିଶା ଠିକାଦାର ମହାସଂଘ ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ଶାଖା ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଆଲୋଚନା ସଭା ଅନୁଷ୍ଠିତ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି। ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି ବ୍ଳକ ଠିକାଦାର  ସଂଘ ସଭାପତି ପ୍ରଶାନ୍ତ କୁମାର ପ୍ରଧାନଙ୍କ ସଂଯୋଜନାରେ ଆୟୋଜିତ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମରେ ଜିଲା ସଭାପତି ଉମାକାନ୍ତ ସାହୁ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷତା କରିଥିଲେ। ଜିଲା ଉପସଭାପତି ଗୋପାଳ ପଣ୍ଡା , ସମ୍ପାଦକ ଜି . ଗୋପାଳ ରାଓ ଦୋରାଙ୍କ ସମେତ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ବ୍ଲକ ସଂଘର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକର୍ତ୍ତା ନୀଳାଞ୍ଚଳ ସାହୁ , ଲକ୍ଷ୍ମୀ ନାରାୟଣ ରେଡ୍ଡୀ , ମହେଶ୍ୱର ନାୟକ , ସଞ୍ଜୟ ରାଉତ , କାହ୍ନୁଚରଣ ଗୈାଡ , ଦେବରାଜ ଭୂୟାଁ , ଅଶୋକ ନାୟକ , ନୀଳାଞ୍ଚଳ ସାହୁ ପ୍ରମୁଖ  ମଞ୍ଚାସିନ ଥିଲେ । ସଭାରେ ସାଙ୍ଗଠନିକ ଅଭିବୃଦ୍ଧି ଏବଂ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ପ୍ରସଙ୍ଗ ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ବିସ୍ତୃତ ଆଲୋଚନା କରାଯାଇ ବିଧିବଦ୍ଧ ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବ ଗୃହୀତ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା  ସଂଘର ଏକତା ବଜାୟ ରଖିବା ସହ ସମସ୍ତ ସରକାରୀ ଟେଣ୍ଡରକୁ କୈାଣସି ସଦସ୍ୟ ସଂଘର ନୀତି ବିରୋଧରେ ଯାଇ ଧାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ସିଡ୍ଯୁଲ ରେଟ ଠାରୁ କମ୍ ମୂଲ୍ୟରେ ଟେଣ୍ଡର କଟ୍ ନ କରିବା ଏବଂ ସଂଘ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ସରକାରଙ୍କୁ ଦିଆଯାଇଥିବା ୮ ଦଫା ଦାବି ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ  ଆଲୋକପାତ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା । ସଭାରେ ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି ସଂଘ ଉପସଭାପତି ଅଶୋକ କୁମାର ସାହୁ , ପ୍ରଦୀପ କୁମାର ପଣ୍ଡା , କୋଷାଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ତୋଫାନ କୁମାର ସାହୁ , ନୀଳମାଧବ ଗୈାଡ , ଅଶୋକ ସ୍ବାଇଁ , ମନୋଜ ପଟ୍ଟନାୟକ  , ଶ୍ରୀଧର ମେକାପ , ଗୋକୁଳ ସାହୁଙ୍କ ସମେତ ଧରାକୋଟ , ସାନଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି , ଶେରଗଡ଼ , ଆସିକା , ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି , ହିଞ୍ଜିଳି , ଚିକିଟି ବ୍ଲକ ଶାଖାର ବହୁ ଠିକାଦାର ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ରହି ସଭା ପରିଚାଳନାରେ ସହଯୋଗ  କରିଥିଲେ ।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ଏକାଠି ହେଲେ ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ଠିକାଦାର ସଂଘ: ଆଗକୁ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: 150+ Nihangs Camp at Himachal Gurudwara, Demand Release of Arrested Members
description: Over 150 Nihangs camp at Paonta Sahib, demanding release of four arrested after Uttarakhand clash.
content: More than 150 Nihangs are camping at Paonta Sahib gurdwara in Sirmaur, Himachal Pradesh, according to news agency PTI. They have demanded the release of four members of their sect who were arrested in Uttarakhand after a clash with locals.The Nihang groups held discussions to chalk out the future course of action. They have declared they would not return to Punjab until the four arrested members are released, the news agency quoted sources as saying.  #WATCH | Himachal Pradesh: Visuals from Gurudwara Paonta Sahib Ji in Sirmaur where a group of Nihang Sikhs reached from Uttarakhand–Himachal Pradesh border late last night. They had a meeting with the administration in wake of dispute between Nihang Sikhs and residents in… pic.twitter.com/cyy6lH8hq5— ANI (@ANI) June 26, 2026 Dehradun District Magistrate, Ashish Chauhan, said, "The issue and the situation that was developing have been resolved amicably. Our Nihang Sahibans are now peacefully returning to Paonta Sahib. At present, no kind of clashes or similar conditions have come to our notice. Around 150 Nihang Sahibans who were already present in Paonta Sahib also cooperated fully, so the situation is now under control."  VIDEO | Dehradun, Uttarakhand: Nihang Sikhs call off their march, Ashish Chauhan, District Magistrate, says, "The issue and the situation that was developing have been resolved amicably. Our Nihang Sahibans are now peacefully returning to Paonta Sahib. At present, no kind of… pic.twitter.com/fu1NHFXMqv— Press Trust of India (@PTI_News) June 26, 2026  Nihang Jatha Pushes March Plan The Nihang Jathas postponed their march to Uttarakhand for two days, thus ending the standoff between Nihangs and the Dehradun administration at the Himachal-Uttarakhand border. They had tried to force entry into Uttarakhand through Dehradun on Thursday and march towards Hemkund Sahib, a Sikh pilgrimage in the state. They pushed barricades and also clashed with the security personnel present there.The group held a meeting with the police, following which they took shelter in Paonta Sahib gurdwara, a few kilometres from the interstate border. Dehradun Senior Superintendent of Police (SSP) Pramendra Dobal said that a few people had crossed the checkpoint at the border, and one or two vehicles had crossed but they agreed to return after discussions.https://youtu.be/EMQqJ1REr-c?si=d88jv94cGW2cG6hkJagdeep Singh Akali, who is leading the Nihang jatha, told the media on Friday that the Uttarakhand administration sought two days to "fulfil their demands", so the plan for a protest march in Uttarakhand has been suspended for the next two days.The Karnaprayag Dispute On June 16, a dispute between residents and a group of Nihangs escalated into violence in Karnaprayag market in Chamoli in Uttarakhand, injuring a few locals and one Nihang, following which the police registered a case and arrested four Nihangs.Earlier, around half a dozen Nihangs climbed onto the roof of the Nagarasu Gurdwara on the Badrinath Highway on June 20, and took an elderly man hostage, demanding the release of those arrested in the Karnaprayag clash.The shrine was vacated on June 23 after discussions between the local administration, gurdwara management, and sect members visiting from Punjab.(With PTI Inputs)

title: Tamil filmmaker K Bhagyaraj dies at 73
When Bhagyaraj and Bharathiraja together created a timeless classic
description: The enduring legacy of K. Bhagyaraj is highlighted by his collaboration with Bharathiraja on the 1985 hit 'Oru Kaidhiyin Diary.' Bhagyaraj penned the story, granting Bharathiraja creative freedom, which resulted in a blockbuster. Bhagyaraj later directed the Hindi remake, 'Aakhree Raasta,' with Amitabh Bachchan, introducing significant screenplay changes and achieving another massive success, showcasing the power of a strong narrative across different directorial styles and languages.

title: Tamilnadu Case: ଜାତୀୟ ମାନବାଧିକାର କମିସନରେ ତାମିଲନାଡ଼ୁରେ ୧୧ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଶ୍ରମିକଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ମାମଲା
description:
ତେଲକୋଇ: ତାମିଲନାଡୁରେ ଆମୋନିଆ ଗ୍ୟାସ୍ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାରେ ଓଡିଆ ଶ୍ରମିକଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ସଂଖ୍ୟା ୧୧ ଶ୍ରମିକ ମୃତ୍ୟୁବରଣ କରିବା ଘଟଣା । ଜାତୀୟ ମାନବାଧିକାର କମିସନରେ ମାମଲା ପହଞ୍ଚିଛି । କୋରାପୁଟ ଜିଲ୍ଲାର ବରିଷ୍ଠ ଆଇନଜୀବୀ ଅନୁପ କୁମାର ପାତ୍ରଙ୍କ ଅଭିଯୋଗରେ କମିସନର କେସ୍‌ ଡାଏରୀ ନମ୍ବର ୧୪୮୧୬/୨୦୨୬ ରେ କେସ୍‌ ପଞ୍ଜିକୃତ ହୋଇଛି । ଅଭିଯୋଗରେ ତେଲକୋଇର ଅଂଚଳର ରୀତା ଜୁଆଙ୍ଗଙ୍କ ସମେତ ଅନ୍ୟମାନଙ୍କର ମୃତ୍ୟୁକୁ ନେଇ ଅଭିଯୋଗ କରିଛନ୍ତି । ଅଭିଯୋଗରେ ତାମିଲନାଡୁର ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଶାସନ ସଚିବ ଓ ପୁଲିସ ମହା ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକଙ୍କୁ ଘଟଣାର ସବିଶେଷ ରିପୋର୍ଟ ଏବଂ ଚାଲିଥିବା ଯୁଗ୍ମ କମିଟି ରିପୋର୍ଟ କମିଶନ ନିକଟରେ ଦାଖଲ କରିବାକୁ ଅନୁରୋଧ କରିଛନ୍ତି ।
୨୫ ଲକ୍ଷ ଟଙ୍କା କ୍ଷତିପୂରଣ ନିବେଦନ
ଶ୍ରମିକମାନେ ଅସୁରକ୍ଷିତ ପରିବେଶ ଏବଂ ବିପଦପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ କାମରେ ନାବାଳିକାକୁ ନିଯୁକ୍ତ କରାଯାଇଥିବାରୁ ତାମିଲନାଡୁ ରାଜ୍ୟ ତିରୁଭାଲ୍ଲୁର ଜିଲା ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ପେରୀୟାପାଲ୍ୟମ ଅଂଚଳରେ ଥିବା ସାମୁଦ୍ରିକ ଖାଦ୍ୟ (ଚିଙ୍ଗୁଡି) ପ୍ରକି୍ରୟାକରଣ କାରଖାନା ମେସର୍ସ ସେଂଟ ପିଟର ଆଣ୍ଡ ସି ଫୁଡ ଏକ୍ସପୋର୍ଟ ପ୍ରାଇଭେଟ ଲିଃ ପରିଚାଳନା କମିଟି ବିରୁଦ୍ଧରେ ଆଇନଗତ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ନେବା ପାଇଁ କମିସନ ଆଦେଶ କରିବାକୁ ଅନୁରୋଧ କରିଛନ୍ତି । ତାମିଲନାଡୁ ସରକାରଙ୍କୁ ଓ କାରଖାନା ପରିଚାଳନା କମିଟିକୁ ଆଦେଶ କରି ମୃତକଙ୍କ ପରିବାରକୁ ୨୫ ଲକ୍ଷ ଟଙ୍କା କ୍ଷତିପୂରଣ ଦେବା ସହ ଆହତମାନଙ୍କୁ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚ ଦେବା ପାଇଁ ଆଦେଶ କରିବାକୁ ଆଇନଜୀବି ଅନୁପ କୁମାର ପାତ୍ର ନିବେଦନ କରିଛନ୍ତି । କେନ୍ଦୁଝର ଜିଲାର କ୍ଷତିଗ୍ରସ୍ତ ପରିବାରକୁ ଉପଯୁକ୍ତ ଥଇଥାନ ଓ ସୁବିଧା ଯୋଗାଇ ଦେବାକୁ କମିସନଙ୍କ ନିକଟରେ ଅନୁରୋଧ କରିଛନ୍ତି । ସେହିପରି ତାମିଲନାଡୁରେ ଥିବା ୬୬୬୯ ବିପଦପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଶିଳ୍ପମାନଙ୍କରେ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଅଡିଟ୍ କରିବାକୁ କମିସନ ଆଦେଶ କରିବାକୁ ସେ ନିବେଦନ କରିଛନ୍ତି ।
Theft: ମନ୍ଦିରରୁ ଲୁଟ୍: ସୁନା, ରୁପା ଅଳଙ୍କାର ସହ ୩୦ ହଜାର ଟଙ୍କାର ଦାନ ଅର୍ଥ ଚୋରି

title: Pakistani national caught by security forces near LoC in J&K's Poonch
description:
Poonch, June 27 : A Pakistani national was apprehended by security forces near the Line of Control (LoC) in Poonch district on Friday.
The individual, identified as Mohd Sajad, son of Rafiq, is a resident of Polas in Pakistan-occupied Kashmir (PoK). He was intercepted after moving suspiciously during routine surveillance around the area.
Security agencies are interrogating the Pok resident to determine his motives and background.
Further details are awaited.
Earlier, Shiv Kumar Sharma, Deputy Inspector General of Police, Udhampur-Reasi Range, chaired a high-level joint security review meeting at Katra to assess and strengthen security and operational preparedness for the Shri Mata Vaishno Devi Yatra ahead of SANJY 2026 and the anticipated surge in pilgrim footfall.
The meeting was attended by SSP Reasi, SP Katra, SDPO Katra, DySP Bhawan and senior officers from the Army, CRPF, Intelligence Bureau, CID, Railways, Traffic Police and representatives of the Shri Mata Vaishno Devi Shrine Board.
SSP Reasi presented a comprehensive security grid and a detailed briefing on the security arrangements in Katra town, the Yatra route and the Holy Shrine. A thorough review was undertaken of all security measures in place, including deployment en route, CCTV surveillance mechanisms, emergency response systems and coordination among stakeholder agencies.
Special emphasis was laid on the security of hilly terrains, high ridges and vulnerable locations surrounding Katra town, the Yatra track and the Holy Shrine. The DIG directed intensified monitoring and strategic deployment of personnel at dominating heights and sensitive points to ensure effective area domination and prevent any security breach. The deployment matrix along the entire route from Katra to Bhawan was also reviewed to ensure adequate coverage and a secure passage for pilgrims.
Regular inspections and verification of hotels, lodges, guest houses, homestays and other accommodation facilities were also emphasised.
The DIG underscored the importance of seamless inter-agency coordination, intelligence sharing and swift response mechanisms to effectively address any emerging challenges.
The meeting concluded with a collective commitment from all participating agencies to ensure a secure, peaceful and devotee-friendly environment for pilgrims visiting the Holy Shrine of Shri Mata Vaishno Devi. (ANI)

title: Assam-terror: ଆସାମରେ ବଡ଼ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଷଡ଼ଯନ୍ତ୍ର ପଣ୍ଡ: ବିସ୍ଫୋରକ ସହ ଦୁଇ ସକ୍ରିୟ ସଦସ୍ୟ ଗିରଫ
description:
ଗୁଆହାଟୀ:  ଆସାମର ତିନସୁକିଆ ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ଷଡ଼ଯନ୍ତ୍ର ପଣ୍ଡ ହୋଇଛି। ପୁଲିସ ଏବଂ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରୀୟ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଏଜେନ୍ସିଗୁଡ଼ିକ ମିଳିତ ଅଭିଯାନରେ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଯୋଜନାକୁ ପଣ୍ଡ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଗୁପ୍ତ ସୂଚନା ଆଧାରରେ ଏକ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ଅଭିଯାନ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଅଭିଯାନ ସମୟରେ ନିଷିଦ୍ଧ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ସଂଗଠନ ଉଲଫା(ଆଇ)ର ଦୁଇ ସକ୍ରିୟ ସଦସ୍ୟଙ୍କୁ ଜାଗୁନ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରୁ ଗିରଫ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଗିରଫ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତମାନଙ୍କୁ ସିଓର ଆସମ ଓରଫ ହ୍ୟୁମାନଜ୍ୟୋତି ବରୁଆ(୨୭ ବର୍ଷ) ଏବଂ ମନୋଜ ଆସମ ଓରଫ ପପୁ ମୋରାନ(୩୦ ବର୍ଷ)ଭାବେ ଚିହ୍ନଟ କରାଯାଇଛି। ମିଳିଥିବା ସୂଚନା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ହ୍ୟୁମାନଜ୍ୟୋତି ବରୁଆ ତିନସୁକିଆର ପାଣିଟୋଲାର ବାସିନ୍ଦା। ସେହିପରି ପପୁ ମୋରାନ ବାଗଜାନ ଅଞ୍ଚଳର ବାସିନ୍ଦା। ଉଭୟ ଉଲଫା(ଆଇ) ସଂଗଠନରେ ସକ୍ରିୟ ଥିବା ଅଭିଯୋଗ ହୋଇଛି। ପ୍ରାଥମିକ ତଦନ୍ତରୁ ଜଣାପଡିଛି ଯେ, ଦୁଇ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ତିନସୁକିଆ ସହରରେ ଆତଙ୍କ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିବା ପାଇଁ ସାଧାରଣ ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ଟାର୍ଗେଟ କରିବାର ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ ଦିଆଯାଇଥିଲା। ପୁଲିସ ଉଭୟଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରିବା ସହିତ ସେମାନଙ୍କଠାରୁ ବିପୁଳ ପରିମାଣରଅସ୍ତ୍ରଶସ୍ତ୍ର ଏବଂ ଅନ୍ୟାନ୍ୟ ସାମଗ୍ରୀ ଜବତ କରିଛି।
 ବଡ଼ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତି ଚାଲିଥିଲା
ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀଙ୍କଠାରୁ ଜବତ ହୋଇଥିବା ସାମଗ୍ରୀ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଦୁଇଟି ଏକେ-୫୬ ରାଇଫଲ୍, ୧୭୨ଟି ଜୀବନ୍ତ ଗୁଳି, ଦୁଇଟି ହାତ ଗ୍ରେନେଡ୍, ଏକ ମେଡିସିନ୍ କିଟ୍, ସିରିଞ୍ଜ, ଓପିଓଏଡ୍, ଜଙ୍ଗଲରେ ଦୀର୍ଘ ସମୟ ରହିବା ପାଇଁ ସାମଗ୍ରୀ, ବ୍ୟାକପ୍ୟାକ୍ ଏବଂ ଆକ୍ରମଣରେ ବ୍ୟବହୃତ ହେଉଥିବା ଅନ୍ୟାନ୍ୟ ସାମଗ୍ରୀ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଭୁକ୍ତ। ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଏଜେନ୍ସିଗୁଡ଼ିକ ଅନୁସାରେ ଏତେ ପରିମାଣର ଅସ୍ତ୍ରଶସ୍ତ୍ର ଏବଂ ବିସ୍ଫୋରକ ଜବତ ହେବା ସୂଚାଇ ଦେଉଛି ଯେ, ଏକ ବଡ଼ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତି ଚାଲିଥିଲା।ଗୁଇନ୍ଦା ସୂଚନା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଜନସାଧାରଣଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଭୟ ଏବଂ ଅସ୍ଥିରତାର ବାତାବରଣ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିବା ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟରେ ଉଲଫା(ଆଇ) ଏହି ଦୁଇ ଜଣଙ୍କୁ ତିନସୁକିଆ ସହରକୁ ପଠାଇଥିଲା ଏବଂ ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରିବାକୁ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ ଦିଆଯାଇଥିଲା। ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ବିପୁଳ ପରିମାଣର ବିସ୍ଫୋରକ ମଧ୍ୟ ଯୋଗାଇ ଦିଆଯାଇଥିଲା। ଏଥିରେ କୌଣସି ବାହ୍ୟ ଶକ୍ତି ଜଡ଼ିତ ରହିଛି କି ନାହିଁ ସେନେଇ ତଦନ୍ତ କରାଯାଉଛି। ଏହି ଘଟଣା ପରେ, ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଏଜେନ୍ସିଗୁଡ଼ିକ ତିନସୁକିଆ ଏବଂ ଏହାର ଆଖପାଖରେ ସମ୍ବେଦନଶୀଳ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଯାଞ୍ଚ୍ କଟକଣା ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରିଛନ୍ତି। ପୁଲିସ କହିଛି ଯେ, ଗିରଫ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତମାନଙ୍କୁ ପଚରାଉଚରା କରାଯାଉଛି ଏବଂ ସେମାନଙ୍କ ନେଟୱାର୍କ, ସହଯୋଗୀ ଏବଂ ସମ୍ଭାବ୍ୟ ଅନ୍ୟାନ୍ୟ ଆଡ୍ଡା ନେଇ ତଲାସୀ ଜାରି ରହିଛି। ଏହି ମାମଲାରେ ଆଇନଗତ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଅଧିକାରୀମାନେ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ତଦନ୍ତ ସମାପ୍ତ ହେବା ପରେ, ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଷଡ଼ଯନ୍ତ୍ର ଏବଂ ଏଥି ସହ ସମ୍ପୃକ୍ତ ଅନ୍ୟ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିବିଶେଷଙ୍କ ବିଷୟରେ ବିସ୍ତୃତ ସୂଚନା ପ୍ରଦାନ କରାଯିବ।
Woman Death: ଖୋଲା ପଡ଼ିଆରୁ ମହିଳାଙ୍କ ଗଳିତ ମୃତଦେହ ଉଦ୍ଧାର

title: ଶନି ମନ୍ଦିରରେ ଫୁଲ ଦେଇ ଫେରୁଥିଲେ, ପଛରୁ ପିଟିଦେଲା ବାଇକ୍‌; ଚାଲିଗଲା…
description:
ପାରଳାଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି, ୨୭।୬(ଗିରିଧାରୀ ପରିଛା): ଗଜପତି ଜିଲା ପାରଳାଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି ସହରରେ ଶନିବାର  ସକାଳୁ ଏକ ମର୍ମନ୍ତୁଦ ସଡ଼କ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ଘଟିଯାଇଛି। ଷ୍ଟାଡିୟମ୍ ନିକଟସ୍ଥ ଇଣ୍ଡିଆନ୍ ପେଟ୍ରୋଲ ପମ୍ପ ସମ୍ମୁଖରେ ଏକ ଦ୍ରୁତଗାମୀ ମୋଟରସାଇକେଲ ଜଣେ ପଥଚାରୀଙ୍କୁ ପଛପଟୁ ଜୋରଦାର ଧକ୍କା ଦେବା ଫଳରେ ତାଙ୍କର ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଘଟିଛି। ଏହି ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାରେ ବାଇକ୍ ଆରୋହୀ ଜଣକ ମଧ୍ୟ ଗୁରୁତର ଆହତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି। ମୃତ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତି ଜଣକ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି ପାରଳାଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି ଦାମୋଦର ବିହାର ବାସିନ୍ଦା ଆର୍ତ୍ତତ୍ରାଣ ପଣ୍ଡା। ସେହିପରି ଆହତ ବାଇକ୍ […]
The post ଶନି ମନ୍ଦିରରେ ଫୁଲ ଦେଇ ଫେରୁଥିଲେ, ପଛରୁ ପିଟିଦେଲା ବାଇକ୍‌; ଚାଲିଗଲା… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ପାରଳାଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି, ୨୭।୬(ଗିରିଧାରୀ ପରିଛା): ଗଜପତି ଜିଲା ପାରଳାଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି ସହରରେ ଶନିବାର  ସକାଳୁ ଏକ ମର୍ମନ୍ତୁଦ ସଡ଼କ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ଘଟିଯାଇଛି। ଷ୍ଟାଡିୟମ୍ ନିକଟସ୍ଥ ଇଣ୍ଡିଆନ୍ ପେଟ୍ରୋଲ ପମ୍ପ ସମ୍ମୁଖରେ ଏକ ଦ୍ରୁତଗାମୀ ମୋଟରସାଇକେଲ ଜଣେ ପଥଚାରୀଙ୍କୁ ପଛପଟୁ ଜୋରଦାର ଧକ୍କା ଦେବା ଫଳରେ ତାଙ୍କର ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଘଟିଛି। ଏହି ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାରେ ବାଇକ୍ ଆରୋହୀ ଜଣକ ମଧ୍ୟ ଗୁରୁତର ଆହତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି। ମୃତ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତି ଜଣକ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି ପାରଳାଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି ଦାମୋଦର ବିହାର ବାସିନ୍ଦା ଆର୍ତ୍ତତ୍ରାଣ ପଣ୍ଡା। ସେହିପରି ଆହତ ବାଇକ୍ ଚାଳକଙ୍କ ନାମ ଏସ୍. କିରଣ ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କ ଘର ପୁଡୁଣି ଗ୍ରାମରେ ବୋଲି ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି।
ସୂଚନା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଆଜି ସକାଳେ ଆର୍ତ୍ତତ୍ରାଣ ଶନି ମନ୍ଦିରରେ ପୂଜାର୍ଚ୍ଚନା ସାରି ଚାଲି ଚାଲି ଘରକୁ ଫେରୁଥିଲେ। ଏହି ସମୟରେ ପଛପଟୁ ଅତି ଦ୍ରୁତଗତିରେ ଆସୁଥିବା ଏକ ବାଇକ୍ ତାଙ୍କୁ ଧକ୍କା ଦେଇଥିଲା। ବାଇକର ଗତି ଏତେ ଅଧିକ ଥିଲା ଯେ ଆର୍ତ୍ତତ୍ରାଣ ରାସ୍ତାରେ ଛିଟିକି ପଡ଼ିଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ହିଁ ତାଙ୍କର ପ୍ରାଣବାୟୁ ଉଡ଼ିଯାଇଥିଲା। ଅପରପକ୍ଷରେ ବାଇକ୍ ଚାଳକ କିରଣ ମଧ୍ୟ ନିଜ ଭାରସାମ୍ୟ ହରାଇ କିଛି ଦୂରକୁ ଛିଟିକି ପଡ଼ି ଗୁରୁତର ଆହତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି।
ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଲୋକଙ୍କ ସହାୟତାରେ ଉଭୟଙ୍କୁ ତୁରନ୍ତ ପାରଳାଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଚିକିତ୍ସାଳୟକୁ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତର କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ସେଠାରେ ଡାକ୍ତର ଆର୍ତ୍ତତ୍ରାଣଙ୍କୁ ମୃତ ଘୋଷଣା କରିଥିବା ବେଳେ ଆହତ କିରଣଙ୍କ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ଜାରି ରହିଛି। ଖବର ପାଇ ପୋଲିସ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ଶବ ଜବତ କରିବା ସହ ତଦନ୍ତ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛି। ପ୍ରାଥମିକ ତଦନ୍ତରୁ ବାଇକ୍ ଚାଳକ ଜଣକ ନିଶାସକ୍ତ ଅବସ୍ଥାରେ ଗାଡ଼ି ଚଲାଉଥିବାରୁ ଏଭଳି ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ଘଟିଥିବା ସନ୍ଦେହ କରାଯାଉଛି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

title: 'Trump To Visit India Early Next Year': Rubio Hails 'Close Relationship' With PM...
description: Rubio said he expected to travel to India before the end of the year to prepare for the President's visit.
content: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Saturday said that President Donald Trump could visit India in the early part of next year. He also underscored the growing momentum in India-US ties as the two countries move closer to concluding a bilateral trade agreement.When asked about Trump's possible visit to India next year, Rubio told IANS, "We're hoping that's what we're working towards - sometime early next year to have the President come. I think it's very positive. India is such a close partner and ally of the United States, and the relationship between the Prime Minister and the President couldn't be closer, which I think is really important in diplomacy."India-US share common interest on energy: RubioRubio said the India-US relationship was in a strong position following the recent meeting between Trump and PM Modi on the sidelines of the G7 Summit."I think it's going fantastic. I mean, it's very strong," he said. "We had a great meeting with the Prime Minister. The President did at the G7."Rubio told IANS that Washington was well-positioned to support India's expanding energy requirements as both countries deepen their strategic partnership."I think obviously India's been focused for a very long time on diversifying its sources of energy, and so I think that trend will continue and we certainly would love to be a part of that," Rubio said. "We think we have some solutions in that regard."He said energy was among several areas where Washington and New Delhi shared common strategic interests."These are the largest democracies in the world and the oldest democracies in the world," he said. "I think we have so much aligned and in common that we can build and work on together our interests on economics, on supply chains, on critical minerals, on energy, on security, on freedom of navigation.""These are all issues that bind us together. We're aligned on so many things," he added.Rubio also praised Prime Minister Narendra Modi's leadership, saying he has steered India through remarkable economic progress and helped position the country as an increasingly influential global power.(With agency inputs)

title: Swim Deep: “Being in a supergroup with Charli XCX felt like playing in a talent contest at school”
description:
n Does Rock ‘N’ Roll Kill Braincells?!, we quiz an artist on their own career to see how much they can remember. This week: Swim Deep
The post Swim Deep: “Being in a supergroup with Charli XCX felt like playing in a talent contest at school” appeared first on NME.
content:
You were part of the charity indie supergroup Bands 4 Refugees. Who introduced you onstage at the 2017 NME Awards?
“Was it Justin [Young] from The Vaccines? Or Kano?”
WRONG. M.I.A. introduced the group, which also included Charli XCX, Olly Alexander, Soft Play’s Isaac Holman and members of fellow B-Towners Peace, covering The Rolling Stones’ ‘Gimme Shelter’.
“No way! I remember meeting Kano, because I made it my Facebook profile photo. A friend at my day-job is obsessed with Charli XCX and I told her: ‘I played in a supergroup with her once!’. She was impressed. A lot of us were pals, and Charli entered the room, who did feel like more of a superstar, but it felt like we were all playing in a talent contest at school. It was a good laugh.”

Which actor was emblazoned on your T-shirt when Swim Deep played Glastonbury in 2015
“I borrowed the T-shirt off my manager. It was his when he was about 17 and I remember him being precious about it. Oh God, who was it? This is going to kill me! I feel it’s in the Patrick Swayze realm?”
WRONG. The shirt featured Robin Williams in character from the 1970s sitcom Mork & Mindy. 
“Ugh, that’s so annoying! We played on the Other stage at Glastonbury that year, and it felt special. There’s something in the ley-lines. We were just going wild. They strictly give you one guest-list place each, and we tried to get our mates in by putting them on the crew list as ‘tambourine player’, etc. As we were getting out of our van, Fat White Family turned up and said, ‘We’ve forgotten our wristbands and we’re on in 20 minutes’. And obviously they’d not lost them – they’d given them to their mates. We thought: Why didn’t we do that? Why are we such chickens? They’re a real band! [Laughs]”

What number did Swim Deep’s 2013 debut album ‘Where the Heaven Are We’ reach on the UK album chart? 
“20?”
CORRECT. How do you look back on that period?
“Fondly. Throughout my twenties, there were phases of looking back on it in a cringe-worthy way because, ultimately, we were teenagers making music. When you’re in your mid-twenties, you rebel from that a bit, but now I’m in my thirties I look back on it as a magical time and a whirlwind. Before my wedding [in 2024], I sat in a cubicle with my best man, Cavan [McCarthy], our bassist, at my stag-do. We were crying to each other about how much we’d done together, and we’d never really had that conversation before.”
Did you enlist any of your musical mates for the wedding band?
“No. We’ve been in a wedding band before for our friends and it always feels like a lot of work. But everyone got on the decks. My wife’s half-Irish, so I got a trad-Irish band to play. I didn’t really want an Oasis cover band which is my heritage!”
Ever meet Oasis? 
“We met Liam [Gallagher] outside Pizza Express once in Camden. It was in our hippie era, and Cav was wearing a big poncho at the time. Liam said a snarky comment like, ‘Yo, psychedelic, dude!’. We loved that.”

Which former UK political party leader once professed to being a fan of Swim Deep? 
“Nick Clegg, leader of the Lib Dems? No? If it’s not Nick Clegg, then God knows!”
WRONG. Close – it was Clegg’s successor Tim Farron, the Liberal Democrat leader from 2015-2017. In 2015, the Westmorland and Lonsdale MP claimed he was “eagerly awaiting the new Swim Deep album”, adding “I think they’re great”. 
“I know he also said he liked Everything Everything.”
He did! Who’s been the most unexpected fan of Swim Deep?
“In 2014, we were playing a festival in Europe, and there was a knock at the door. It was a Tyler, the Creator and he popped his head in and said, ‘I love the new video guys’, in his really low voice. In his true humorous fashion, he then just ran away. We were gobsmacked. He was talking about our original video for ‘King City’ which is just us skating around Birmingham and was shot by our friend. It feels like a very Tyler, the Creator-adjacent video, but it was unexpected – and welcome ‘cause we’re big fans.”

At Glastonbury, which musical titan did Alexa Chung once tell Cav he looked like?
“[Laughs] Was it Bowie?”
CORRECT. 
“YES!! That’s another unexpected fan. Alexa Chung is my poster girl from my teenage years, which is awkward to say because I know her now. She’s great and a real icon. I loved her humour when she interviewed bands on Popworld. When she said she was a fan of us and Tame Impala, we lost our minds. Actually, at the start of ‘She Changes The Weather’, when it’s just the piano and quite ambient, you hear talking but you can’t make out what we’re saying. I wanted it to feel like being at a gig and you can hear just indistinguishable nattering in the crowd. When we went into the booth to fake this talking, we didn’t know what to talk about, so I just remember us saying ‘Alexa Chung’ quite a few times. Maybe we manifested her being a fan!”

Swim Deep’s ‘One Great Song And I Could Change the World’ appears in which video game?
“FIFA 16.”
CORRECT.
“Definitely one of our proudest achievements! When a posted about being in FIFA, every friend from school congratulated me. When he found out I was in a band called Swim Deep, the bouncer on the door at my day job said: ‘No way! ‘One Great Song And I Could Change the World’ was one of my favourite songs on FIFA 16 and it reminds me of my childhood. That song has one of the best riffs I’ve heard’. That inspired me to write the riff for our recent single, ‘You, Me & Mary’ because I wanted to prove to myself that I could write a riff again ‘cause I hadn’t done it in so long.”
“Early on, we toured Europe and The 1975 supported us. Even then, they had a sleeper bus and we were in a tiny van. [Laughs] They were bigger than us already. But we’d go onto their bus to play FIFA a lot and they were big stoners, so you’d come off their bus feeling like it was yesterday.”
Who was the best at FIFA out of Swim Deep and The 1975?
“The 1975’s George [Daniel] and Ross [MacDonald] were probably the best out of The 1975 – but I think we were better, I’d like to say! [Laughs]. We all ended up being friends and then they later took us on tour with them throughout America. They stretched down their hands when they got really big to us, which was a really sweet thing. Don’t believe everything you hear about them: they’re really nice guys.”

Can you complete the following lyrics: ‘Don’t you put a spell on me…’? 
“Is this a Swim Deep lyric? I don’t believe I’ve ever written… oh!… it’s ‘Don’t you put a spell on me, tassel man / I wanna live past twenty-three, tassel man’.
CORRECT. From your and Wolf Alice’s (officially unreleased) collab ‘Tassel Man’ that you co-wrote together when dating.
“That’s a deep cut! We made it when we were 23 so that puts a stamp on it. Obviously me and Ellie Rowsell were both writing our own songs – me for Swim Deep, her for Wolf Alice. We had a couple of beers and decided to see what would happen. At the time we were listening to Temples and a lot of psychedelia and Nuggets compilations. We’d come back on a bus somewhere and there was a guy who had a cotton crocheted thing with tassels coming out the top it. It freaked us out and we called him the Tassel Man, and wrote a song about how we thought he was putting a spell on us. We made a second song, ‘Tassel Man 2’, so maybe we’ll put it out at some point. I’ll text her.”

Which Swim Deep band member won at bowling when NME visited you in Brussels earlier this year for an in-studio feature about your latest album ‘Hum’?
“[Laughs] I think it was me?”
CORRECT. When you look back on Swim Deep’s journey, how does it feel to release your fifth album?
“This album reflects that journey a lot and how we’ve grown up together. The band’s changed a lot, but the heart, the ethos, the drive, and the dream is similar. We’re an inspiring band because it’s real-world and we all go back to our jobs. For the first three years, we didn’t have to do that, but watching this journey of friends trying to make music whilst juggling real-life feels inspiring and we’re proud to get it out.”
When you recorded ‘Hum’ at ICP studios, you were warned, ‘The lead singer of Placebo is in the flat below you so please, no parties’.
“I saw him [Brian Molko] once or twice and we nodded our heads to each other, but he was very to himself. He chain-smoked constantly, so my bed smelled of cigs constantly! It was nice being in the presence of greatness, though.”

‘Fueiho Boogie’, the closing track from Swim Deep’s second album, ‘Mothers’, takes its name from the Japanese ‘Fueiho’ laws which policed dancing in clubs. In what year was the legislation change?
“That song came out in 2015, so 2016?”
CORRECT.
“[Joking] Thanks to us and that song! [Laughs] I always worried whether we were going to get trouble for it in Japan, if it might be seen as a slight on the law. We haven’t actually been back there since we released the song, so maybe we did!”
“It’s one of my favourites and a departure from the world we’d created on the first album, which some reviews called ‘wishy-washy’. That got to us. I wish I could go back and give myself a slap and say: ‘Look at the people who actually like your music rather than listening to the critics’. ‘Mothers’ was partly us saying, ‘we can make an album that is reviewed well’, but mainly we wanted to experiment and were listening to krautrock and acid house.
“The first album was made on the dole on GarageBand and then taken to a studio when we got signed, whereas with the second one we had the time, money and freedom to do what we wanted.”

What is the B-side to Swim Deep’s 2015 single ‘To My Brother’? 
“Is it ‘Si Si Me Voy’?”
WRONG. ‘Hotel California’.
“Of course it is! I knew I was going to do badly, but zero points is not good! ‘Hotel California’ was the first song that we wrote after ‘Where the Heaven Are We’. We were really into ‘Hotel California’ by the Eagles and kept singing it, so my chorus has echoes of it.”

The verdict: 6/10
“That’s the same score NME awarded ‘Where the Heaven Are We’!”
Swim Deep’s fifth album, ‘Hum’, is out now via Submarine Cat Records. The band embark on a UK headline tour this autumn, with remaining tickets available here
The post Swim Deep: “Being in a supergroup with Charli XCX felt like playing in a talent contest at school” appeared first on NME.

title: Dr Madhu Chopra shares habits to stay ‘healthy, hydrated and energised’ this summer
Qualcomm’s big AI gamble: Breaking Nvidia’s chips stronghold
description: CEO Cristiano Amon is betting Qualcomm can gain a foothold in data center AI—and the chipmaker has already lined up clients like Meta and Microsoft.
content:
Qualcomm has long been known primarily as the maker of smartphone chips, but since taking the reins five years ago, CEO Cristiano Amon has worked to change that and equip the company for the tough but lucrative AI chip wars. Since 2021, Qualcomm has reinvented itself to become a major player in newer areas such as tech for cars—including driver-assistance and connected-vehicle systems±—and chips to power smart home devices and wearables.



Now, Amon has a more ambitious target in his sights: His five-year plan, presented to investors this week, is nothing less than a challenge to Nvidia’s long dominance in the market for A.I. chips for data centers. At Qualcomm’s investor day in Manhattan on Wednesday, he and his team unveiled its latest lines of AI accelerators and central processing units (CPUs).



Taking Nvidia on won’t be easy for Qualcomm. After all, Nvidia—the most valuable company in the world with a market capitalization of $4.7 trillion—is the market leader by far in AI chips. “A lot of people ask, ‘Oh, in this crowded market, is it too late? It’s never too late for Qualcomm,” Amon told a packed room of Wall Street analysts on Wednesday. 



Investors seemed to agree with Amon’s assessment: Qualcomm shares shot up as much as 15% on Wednesday when the chipmaker forecast annual sales of more than $15 billion from A.I. components in data centers by fiscal 2029. (By Friday, those share gains had mostly evaporated, as Qualcomm was dragged down by the sell-off hitting many large tech stocks on the Nasdaq.)



Qualcomm also projected annual revenue of $40 billion for its businesses excluding handsets, long its big revenue driver, by 2029. That’s double a long-range forecast from two years ago and a signal that Qualcomm is making progress in its efforts to rely less on mobile phone chips.



Qualcomm’s investor day featured video endorsements from the CEOs of Meta and Microsoft, Mark Zuckerberg and Satya Nadella respectively, and senior executives from Amazon and Google extolling the virtues of Qualcomm’s tech.



Amon said he recognizes the public’s concerns about AI and data centers, with their massive power needs, and he  sees that as an opportunity to stand out by offering products like power-efficient CPUs. “There is pushback,” he said, “but that’s good because it is going to drive the industry to look for alternatives.”



The Qualcomm executives’ presentations were dizzying, with so many initiatives being pursued at once: In addition to the data center efforts, the company is pushing further into the automotive space, and taking on Intel and AMD, among others, in the PC chips market. 



The company will also be busy integrating a large new venture: This week, Qualcomm announced the $3.9 billion acquisition of AI software company Modular, which gives Qualcomm a software platform to compete with Nvidia’s CUDA. That platform allows users to develop AI programs and services and take full advantage of Nvidia’s graphics processing units (GPUs), leading many developers who write programs to stick with Nvidia. Modular is an attempt to weaken that Nvidia dominance.



Amon, a Brazilian engineer who joined Qualcomm 30 years ago and became its CEO in 2021, dismisses the notion that this is all too much for Qualcomm to chase at once, saying the company has been on this reinvention path many times before.



“We have a very, very strong engineering culture. It’s a company that is not afraid of taking on completely new challenges,” he told Fortune, declaring that “it’s been a pressure cooker for each one of the years since we started.”



Amon recalled facing questions in 2021 about why Qualcomm was chasing so many rabbits at once, between developing its automotive business, its PC chips and industrial applications. “Because we can,” he recalled answering the skeptics. “And now we have the exact same thing.”



Still, a successful reinvention requires getting the troops on board. “You have to overcommunicate, you have to have clarity of vision, and you need to do it as many times as is necessary to make sure everybody understands it,” said Amon. “It’s like you see in those movies, before a big battle, the general goes in front of the troops and makes a speech, because people are going to have to believe in it to really commit.”
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com
